authors_text: Camille Noufi,Lloyd May,Jonathan Berger
title: The Role of Vocal Persona in Natural and Synthesized Speech
title_zh: 声音角色在自然语音和合成语音中的作用
comment: To be published in the proceedings of the 17th IEEE International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition as part of the Workshop on Socially Interactive Human-like Virtual Agents (SIVA '23)
comments: To be published in the proceedings of the 17th IEEE International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition as part of the Workshop on Socially Interactive Human-like Virtual Agents (SIVA '23)
abstract: The inclusion of voice persona in synthesized voice can be significant in a broad range of human-computer-interaction (HCI) applications, including augmentative and assistive communication (AAC), artistic performance, and design of virtual agents. We propose a framework to imbue compelling and contextually-dependent expression within a synthesized voice by introducing the role of the vocal persona within a synthesis system. In this framework, the resultant 'tone of voice' is defined as a point existing within a continuous, contextually-dependent probability space that is traversable by the user of the voice. We also present initial findings of a thematic analysis of 10 interviews with vocal studies and performance experts to further understand the role of the vocal persona within a natural communication ecology. The themes identified are then used to inform the design of the aforementioned framework.
summary: The inclusion of voice persona in synthesized voice can be significant in a broad range of human-computer-interaction (HCI) applications, including augmentative and assistive communication (AAC), artistic performance, and design of virtual agents. We propose a framework to imbue compelling and contextually-dependent expression within a synthesized voice by introducing the role of the vocal persona within a synthesis system. In this framework, the resultant 'tone of voice' is defined as a point existing within a continuous, contextually-dependent probability space that is traversable by the user of the voice. We also present initial findings of a thematic analysis of 10 interviews with vocal studies and performance experts to further understand the role of the vocal persona within a natural communication ecology. The themes identified are then used to inform the design of the aforementioned framework.
abstract_zh: 在合成语音中包含语音角色对于广泛的人机交互 (HCI) 应用具有重要意义，包括增强和辅助通信 (AAC)、艺术表演和虚拟代理的设计。我们提出了一个框架，通过在合成系统中引入声音角色的作用，在合成声音中注入引人注目的且依赖于上下文的表达。在此框架中，所得的“语气”被定义为存在于连续的、上下文相关的概率空间内的点，该空间可由语音的用户遍历。我们还提出了对声乐研究和表演专家 10 次访谈进行主题分析的初步结果，以进一步了解声乐角色在自然传播生态中的作用。然后，确定的主题将用于指导上述框架的设计。

AI.tldr: 提出一个框架，将语音角色融入合成语音，以增强人机交互中的表达。
AI.motivation: 合成语音在AAC、艺术表演等场景中应用广泛，但缺乏个性化表达，需引入语音角色以提升自然性和情境适应性。
AI.method: 提出包含语音角色的合成语音框架，定义基于上下文的概率空间，并通过10位专家的访谈进行主题分析。
AI.result: 初步访谈分析识别出语音角色在自然交流中的关键主题，为框架设计提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 语音角色是提升合成语音表现力的关键，需结合自然语言特征和用户需求进行设计。

authors_text: Antoine Monod,Julie Delon,Matias Tassano,Andrés Almansa
title: Video Restoration with a Deep Plug-and-Play Prior
title_zh: 具有深度即插即用优先功能的视频恢复
comment: 10 pages + 4 pages supplementary; code at github.com/amonod/pnp-video
comments: 10 pages + 4 pages supplementary; code at github.com/amonod/pnp-video
abstract: This paper presents a novel method for restoring digital videos via a Deep Plug-and-Play (PnP) approach. Under a Bayesian formalism, the method consists in using a deep convolutional denoising network in place of the proximal operator of the prior in an alternating optimization scheme. We distinguish ourselves from prior PnP work by directly applying that method to restore a digital video from a degraded video observation. This way, a network trained once for denoising can be repurposed for other video restoration tasks. Our experiments in video deblurring, super-resolution, and interpolation of random missing pixels all show a clear benefit to using a network specifically designed for video denoising, as it yields better restoration performance and better temporal stability than a single image network with similar denoising performance using the same PnP formulation. Moreover, our method compares favorably to applying a different state-of-the-art PnP scheme separately on each frame of the sequence. This opens new perspectives in the field of video restoration.
summary: This paper presents a novel method for restoring digital videos via a Deep Plug-and-Play (PnP) approach. Under a Bayesian formalism, the method consists in using a deep convolutional denoising network in place of the proximal operator of the prior in an alternating optimization scheme. We distinguish ourselves from prior PnP work by directly applying that method to restore a digital video from a degraded video observation. This way, a network trained once for denoising can be repurposed for other video restoration tasks. Our experiments in video deblurring, super-resolution, and interpolation of random missing pixels all show a clear benefit to using a network specifically designed for video denoising, as it yields better restoration performance and better temporal stability than a single image network with similar denoising performance using the same PnP formulation. Moreover, our method compares favorably to applying a different state-of-the-art PnP scheme separately on each frame of the sequence. This opens new perspectives in the field of video restoration.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种通过深度即插即用 (PnP) 方法恢复数字视频的新颖方法。在贝叶斯形式主义下，该方法包括使用深度卷积去噪网络代替交替优化方案中先验的近端算子。我们与之前的 PnP 工作的区别在于直接应用该方法从降级的视频观察中恢复数字视频。这样，经过一次去噪训练的网络就可以重新用于其他视频恢复任务。我们在视频去模糊、超分辨率和随机缺失像素插值方面的实验都表明，使用专门为视频去噪而设计的网络具有明显的好处，因为与使用相同 PnP 公式的具有类似去噪性能的单个图像网络相比，它可以产生更好的恢复性能和更好的时间稳定性。此外，我们的方法优于在序列的每一帧上分别应用不同的最先进的 PnP 方案。这为视频修复领域开辟了新的视角。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度插件式先验的视频修复方法，通过贝叶斯框架利用深度卷积去噪网络替代近端算子进行视频恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有PnP方法多针对单帧图像，缺乏对视频序列时序特性的有效利用，而视频修复需兼顾空间与时间稳定性。
AI.method: 在贝叶斯框架下，将预训练的深度去噪网络嵌入交替优化流程，替代传统近端算子，直接对退化视频进行端到端恢复。
AI.result: 实验表明，视频专用网络在去模糊、超分和插值任务中均优于单帧网络及帧级PnP方法，且时间稳定性更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过复用视频去噪网络实现多任务修复，为视频恢复领域提供了新的技术路线和优化方向。

ai_content.motivation: 现有PnP方法多针对单帧图像，缺乏对视频序列时序特性的有效利用，而视频修复需兼顾空间与时间稳定性。

motivation: 现有PnP方法多针对单帧图像，缺乏对视频序列时序特性的有效利用，而视频修复需兼顾空间与时间稳定性。
method: 在贝叶斯框架下，将预训练的深度去噪网络嵌入交替优化流程，替代传统近端算子，直接对退化视频进行端到端恢复。
result: 实验表明，视频专用网络在去模糊、超分和插值任务中均优于单帧网络及帧级PnP方法，且时间稳定性更优。
conclusion: 该方法通过复用视频去噪网络实现多任务修复，为视频恢复领域提供了新的技术路线和优化方向。
search_text: Video Restoration with a Deep Plug-and-Play Prior 具有深度即插即用优先功能的视频恢复 This paper presents a novel method for restoring digital videos via a Deep Plug-and-Play (PnP) approach. Under a Bayesian formalism, the method consists in using a deep convolutional denoising network in place of the proximal operator of the prior in an alternating optimization scheme. We distinguish ourselves from prior PnP work by directly applying that method to restore a digital video from a degraded video observation. This way, a network trained once for denoising can be repurposed for other video restoration tasks. Our experiments in video deblurring, super-resolution, and interpolation of random missing pixels all show a clear benefit to using a network specifically designed for video denoising, as it yields better restoration performance and better temporal stability than a single image network with similar denoising performance using the same PnP formulation. Moreover, our method compares favorably to applying a different state-of-the-art PnP scheme separately on each frame of the sequence. This opens new perspectives in the field of video restoration. 本文提出了一种通过深度即插即用 (PnP) 方法恢复数字视频的新颖方法。在贝叶斯形式主义下，该方法包括使用深度卷积去噪网络代替交替优化方案中先验的近端算子。我们与之前的 PnP 工作的区别在于直接应用该方法从降级的视频观察中恢复数字视频。这样，经过一次去噪训练的网络就可以重新用于其他视频恢复任务。我们在视频去模糊、超分辨率和随机缺失像素插值方面的实验都表明，使用专门为视频去噪而设计的网络具有明显的好处，因为与使用相同 PnP 公式的具有类似去噪性能的单个图像网络相比，它可以产生更好的恢复性能和更好的时间稳定性。此外，我们的方法优于在序列的每一帧上分别应用不同的最先进的 PnP 方案。这为视频修复领域开辟了新的视角。 本文提出一种基于深度插件式先验的视频修复方法，通过贝叶斯框架利用深度卷积去噪网络替代近端算子进行视频恢复。 Antoine Monod,Julie Delon,Matias Tassano,Andrés Almansa eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,math.OC

authors_text: Deepthi Raghunandan,Aayushi Roy,Shenzhi Shi,Niklas Elmqvist,Leilani Battle
title: Code Code Evolution: Understanding How People Change Data Science Notebooks Over Time
title_zh: 代码代码演变：了解人们如何随着时间的推移改变数据科学笔记本
abstract: Sensemaking is the iterative process of identifying, extracting, and explaining insights from data, where each iteration is referred to as the "sensemaking loop." Although recent work observes snapshots of the sensemaking loop within computational notebooks, none measure shifts in sensemaking behaviors over time -- between exploration and explanation. This gap limits our ability to understand the full scope of the sensemaking process and thus our ability to design tools to fully support sensemaking. We contribute the first quantitative method to characterize how sensemaking evolves within data science computational notebooks. To this end, we conducted a quantitative study of 2,574 Jupyter notebooks mined from GitHub. First, we identify data science-focused notebooks that have undergone significant iterations. Second, we present regression models that automatically characterize sensemaking activity within individual notebooks by assigning them a score representing their position within the sensemaking spectrum. Finally, we use our regression models to calculate and analyze shifts in notebook scores across GitHub versions. Our results show that notebook authors participate in a diverse range of sensemaking tasks over time, such as annotation, branching analysis, and documentation. Finally, we propose design recommendations for extending notebook environments to support the sensemaking behaviors we observed.
summary: Sensemaking is the iterative process of identifying, extracting, and explaining insights from data, where each iteration is referred to as the "sensemaking loop." Although recent work observes snapshots of the sensemaking loop within computational notebooks, none measure shifts in sensemaking behaviors over time -- between exploration and explanation. This gap limits our ability to understand the full scope of the sensemaking process and thus our ability to design tools to fully support sensemaking. We contribute the first quantitative method to characterize how sensemaking evolves within data science computational notebooks. To this end, we conducted a quantitative study of 2,574 Jupyter notebooks mined from GitHub. First, we identify data science-focused notebooks that have undergone significant iterations. Second, we present regression models that automatically characterize sensemaking activity within individual notebooks by assigning them a score representing their position within the sensemaking spectrum. Finally, we use our regression models to calculate and analyze shifts in notebook scores across GitHub versions. Our results show that notebook authors participate in a diverse range of sensemaking tasks over time, such as annotation, branching analysis, and documentation. Finally, we propose design recommendations for extending notebook environments to support the sensemaking behaviors we observed.
abstract_zh: 意义建构是从数据中识别、提取和解释见解的迭代过程，其中每次迭代被称为“意义建构循环”。尽管最近的工作观察了计算笔记本中意义建构循环的快照，但没有任何措施可以衡量意义建构行为随时间的变化——在探索和解释之间。这一差距限制了我们理解意义建构过程的全部范围的能力，从而限制了我们设计完全支持意义建构的工具的能力。我们贡献了第一个定量方法来描述数据科学计算笔记本中意义建构的演变。为此，我们对从 GitHub 挖掘的 2,574 个 Jupyter Notebook 进行了定量研究。首先，我们确定了经过重大迭代的专注于数据科学的笔记本。其次，我们提出了回归模型，通过为各个笔记本分配代表其在意义建构频谱中的位置的分数，自动表征各个笔记本中的意义建构活动。最后，我们使用回归模型来计算和分析 GitHub 版本之间笔记本分数的变化。我们的结果表明，随着时间的推移，笔记本作者参与了各种各样的意义建构任务，例如注释、分支分析和文档。最后，我们提出了扩展笔记本环境以支持我们观察到的意义建构行为的设计建议。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种量化方法，用于分析数据科学计算笔记本中感知识过程（sensemaking）随时间的变化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅能捕捉计算笔记本中感知识循环的静态快照，无法测量探索与解释之间的行为变化，限制了对感知识过程的全面理解及工具设计。
AI.method: 通过分析GitHub上的2,574个Jupyter笔记本，识别出经过多次迭代的数据科学笔记本，构建回归模型对单个笔记本的感知识活动进行评分，并分析版本间的评分变化。
AI.result: 发现笔记本作者随时间参与了注释、分支分析和文档编写等多样化任务，并提出扩展笔记本环境的设计建议。
AI.conclusion: 该方法揭示了感知识行为的动态演变规律，为改进数据科学工具提供了理论依据和实践指导。

authors_text: Joseph Norby,Ardalan Tajbakhsh,Yanhao Yang,Aaron M. Johnson
title: Adaptive Complexity Model Predictive Control
title_zh: 自适应复杂性模型预测控制
abstract: This work introduces a formulation of model predictive control (MPC) which adaptively reasons about the complexity of the model based on the task while maintaining feasibility and stability guarantees. Existing MPC implementations often handle computational complexity by shortening prediction horizons or simplifying models, both of which can result in instability. Inspired by related approaches in behavioral economics, motion planning, and biomechanics, our method solves MPC problems with a simple model for dynamics and constraints over regions of the horizon where such a model is feasible and a complex model where it is not. The approach leverages an interleaving of planning and execution to iteratively identify these regions, which can be safely simplified if they satisfy an exact template/anchor relationship. We show that this method does not compromise the stability and feasibility properties of the system, and measure performance in simulation experiments on a quadrupedal robot executing agile behaviors over terrains of interest. We find that this adaptive method enables more agile motion and expands the range of executable tasks compared to fixed-complexity implementations.
summary: This work introduces a formulation of model predictive control (MPC) which adaptively reasons about the complexity of the model based on the task while maintaining feasibility and stability guarantees. Existing MPC implementations often handle computational complexity by shortening prediction horizons or simplifying models, both of which can result in instability. Inspired by related approaches in behavioral economics, motion planning, and biomechanics, our method solves MPC problems with a simple model for dynamics and constraints over regions of the horizon where such a model is feasible and a complex model where it is not. The approach leverages an interleaving of planning and execution to iteratively identify these regions, which can be safely simplified if they satisfy an exact template/anchor relationship. We show that this method does not compromise the stability and feasibility properties of the system, and measure performance in simulation experiments on a quadrupedal robot executing agile behaviors over terrains of interest. We find that this adaptive method enables more agile motion and expands the range of executable tasks compared to fixed-complexity implementations.
abstract_zh: 这项工作引入了模型预测控制（MPC）的公式，它根据任务自适应地推理模型的复杂性，同时保持可行性和稳定性保证。现有的 MPC 实现通常通过缩短预测范围或简化模型来处理计算复杂性，这两者都可能导致不稳定。受到行为经济学、运动规划和生物力学相关方法的启发，我们的方法通过一个简单的动态模型和地平线区域的约束来解决 MPC 问题，其中该模型可行，而复杂的模型则不可行。该方法利用规划和执行的交错来迭代地识别这些区域，如果它们满足精确的模板/锚关系，则可以安全地简化这些区域。我们证明这种方法不会损害系统的稳定性和可行性，并在四足机器人在感兴趣的地形上执行敏捷行为的模拟实验中测量性能。我们发现，与固定复杂度的实现相比，这种自适应方法可以实现更敏捷的运动，并扩大了可执行任务的范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应复杂度模型预测控制（MPC）方法，根据任务动态调整模型复杂度，同时保证系统稳定性与可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有MPC方法通过缩短预测时域或简化模型处理计算复杂度，可能导致系统不稳定。本文旨在解决这一问题，通过自适应调整模型复杂度提升系统敏捷性与任务执行范围。
AI.method: 方法结合行为经济学、运动规划和生物力学思路，在预测时域中分区域使用简化的模型（可行区域）和复杂模型（不可行区域），通过规划与执行的交替迭代识别安全简化区域。
AI.result: 在四足机器人敏捷运动仿真中验证了该方法，结果表明其相比固定复杂度方法实现了更敏捷的运动和更广的任务执行范围，同时保持系统稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 自适应复杂度MPC方法在不牺牲稳定性与可行性前提下，通过动态调整模型复杂度有效提升了系统性能与任务适应性。

We find that this adaptive method enables more agile motion and expands the range of executable tasks compared to fixed-complexity implementations. 这项工作引入了模型预测控制（MPC）的公式，它根据任务自适应地推理模型的复杂性，同时保持可行性和稳定性保证。现有的 MPC 实现通常通过缩短预测范围或简化模型来处理计算复杂性，这两者都可能导致不稳定。受到行为经济学、运动规划和生物力学相关方法的启发，我们的方法通过一个简单的动态模型和地平线区域的约束来解决 MPC 问题，其中该模型可行，而复杂的模型则不可行。该方法利用规划和执行的交错来迭代地识别这些区域，如果它们满足精确的模板/锚关系，则可以安全地简化这些区域。我们证明这种方法不会损害系统的稳定性和可行性，并在四足机器人在感兴趣的地形上执行敏捷行为的模拟实验中测量性能。我们发现，与固定复杂度的实现相比，这种自适应方法可以实现更敏捷的运动，并扩大了可执行任务的范围。 本文提出了一种自适应复杂度模型预测控制（MPC）方法，根据任务动态调整模型复杂度，同时保证系统稳定性与可行性。 Joseph Norby,Ardalan Tajbakhsh,Yanhao Yang,Aaron M. Johnson cs.RO

authors_text: Rohit Gandikota,Nik Bear Brown
title: DC-Art-GAN: Stable Procedural Content Generation using DC-GANs for Digital Art
title_zh: DC-Art-GAN：使用 DC-GAN 进行数字艺术的稳定程序内容生成
comment: the project is done as an undergrad report. On the hind sight, it does not contain full and exhaustive analysis
comments: the project is done as an undergrad report. On the hind sight, it does not contain full and exhaustive analysis
abstract: Art is an artistic method of using digital technologies as a part of the generative or creative process. With the advent of digital currency and NFTs (Non-Fungible Token), the demand for digital art is growing aggressively. In this manuscript, we advocate the concept of using deep generative networks with adversarial training for a stable and variant art generation. The work mainly focuses on using the Deep Convolutional Generative Adversarial Network (DC-GAN) and explores the techniques to address the common pitfalls in GAN training. We compare various architectures and designs of DC-GANs to arrive at a recommendable design choice for a stable and realistic generation. The main focus of the work is to generate realistic images that do not exist in reality but are synthesised from random noise by the proposed model. We provide visual results of generated animal face images (some pieces of evidence showing a blend of species) along with recommendations for training, architecture and design choices. We also show how training image preprocessing plays a massive role in GAN training.
summary: Art is an artistic method of using digital technologies as a part of the generative or creative process. With the advent of digital currency and NFTs (Non-Fungible Token), the demand for digital art is growing aggressively. In this manuscript, we advocate the concept of using deep generative networks with adversarial training for a stable and variant art generation. The work mainly focuses on using the Deep Convolutional Generative Adversarial Network (DC-GAN) and explores the techniques to address the common pitfalls in GAN training. We compare various architectures and designs of DC-GANs to arrive at a recommendable design choice for a stable and realistic generation. The main focus of the work is to generate realistic images that do not exist in reality but are synthesised from random noise by the proposed model. We provide visual results of generated animal face images (some pieces of evidence showing a blend of species) along with recommendations for training, architecture and design choices. We also show how training image preprocessing plays a massive role in GAN training.
abstract_zh: 艺术是一种使用数字技术作为生成或创作过程一部分的艺术方法。随着数字货币和 NFT（不可替代代币）的出现，对数字艺术的需求正在急剧增长。在这份手稿中，我们提倡使用深度生成网络和对抗性训练来实现稳定和多样化的艺术生成的概念。这项工作主要集中于使用深度卷积生成对抗网络（DC-GAN）并探索解决 GAN 训练中常见陷阱的技术。我们比较了 DC-GAN 的各种架构和设计，以获得稳定且现实的一代的推荐设计选择。这项工作的主要重点是生成现实中不存在但由所提出的模型从随机噪声合成的逼真图像。我们提供生成的动物面部图像的视觉结果（一些显示物种混合的证据）以及培训、架构和设计选择的建议。我们还展示了训练图像预处理如何在 GAN 训练中发挥重要作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DC-Art-GAN模型，利用深度卷积生成对抗网络（DC-GAN）实现稳定且多样的数字艺术生成，重点解决GAN训练中的常见问题。
AI.motivation: 随着数字货币和NFT的兴起，数字艺术需求激增，但传统GAN存在训练不稳定、生成质量不高等问题，亟需稳定可靠的生成方法。
AI.method: 通过比较不同DC-GAN架构与设计，探索稳定训练技术，并强调图像预处理对生成效果的关键作用，最终提出推荐的网络设计与训练方案。
AI.result: 生成了具有物种混合特征的动物面部图像，验证了模型有效性，并提供了训练参数、架构选择及预处理步骤的实践建议。
AI.conclusion: DC-Art-GAN通过优化架构与训练流程，成功实现了稳定、高质量的数字艺术生成，为NFT等应用场景提供了可行的技术路径。

authors_text: Vongani H. Maluleke,Neerja Thakkar,Tim Brooks,Ethan Weber,Trevor Darrell,Alexei A. Efros,Angjoo Kanazawa,Devin Guillory
title: Studying Bias in GANs through the Lens of Race
title_zh: 从种族的角度研究 GAN 中的偏见
abstract: In this work, we study how the performance and evaluation of generative image models are impacted by the racial composition of their training datasets. By examining and controlling the racial distributions in various training datasets, we are able to observe the impacts of different training distributions on generated image quality and the racial distributions of the generated images. Our results show that the racial compositions of generated images successfully preserve that of the training data. However, we observe that truncation, a technique used to generate higher quality images during inference, exacerbates racial imbalances in the data. Lastly, when examining the relationship between image quality and race, we find that the highest perceived visual quality images of a given race come from a distribution where that race is well-represented, and that annotators consistently prefer generated images of white people over those of Black people.
summary: In this work, we study how the performance and evaluation of generative image models are impacted by the racial composition of their training datasets. By examining and controlling the racial distributions in various training datasets, we are able to observe the impacts of different training distributions on generated image quality and the racial distributions of the generated images. Our results show that the racial compositions of generated images successfully preserve that of the training data. However, we observe that truncation, a technique used to generate higher quality images during inference, exacerbates racial imbalances in the data. Lastly, when examining the relationship between image quality and race, we find that the highest perceived visual quality images of a given race come from a distribution where that race is well-represented, and that annotators consistently prefer generated images of white people over those of Black people.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了生成图像模型的性能和评估如何受到训练数据集的种族组成的影响。通过检查和控制各种训练数据集中的种族分布，我们能够观察不同训练分布对生成图像质量和生成图像的种族分布的影响。我们的结果表明，生成图像的种族成分成功地保留了训练数据的种族成分。然而，我们观察到截断（一种用于在推理过程中生成更高质量图像的技术）加剧了数据中的种族不平衡。最后，在检查图像质量和种族之间的关系时，我们发现给定种族的最高感知视觉质量图像来自该种族具有良好代表性的分布，并且注释者始终更喜欢生成的白人图​​像而不是黑人图像。

AI.tldr: 研究生成对抗网络（GAN）在生成图像时，训练数据集的种族构成如何影响生成图像的质量和种族分布。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型可能存在隐性种族偏差，但缺乏对训练数据分布与生成结果间关系的系统性研究。
AI.method: 通过控制训练数据集的种族分布比例，训练GAN模型并应用截断技术，分析生成图像质量与种族分布的变化规律。
AI.result: 生成图像种族构成与训练数据一致，但截断技术会放大种族比例失衡；标注者普遍认为白人生成图像质量更高。
AI.conclusion: GAN模型会继承训练数据的种族分布特征，但后处理技术可能加剧偏差，且存在系统性种族偏好，需在数据与评估环节进行改进。

authors_text: Jiayun Wang,Sangryul Jeon,Stella X. Yu,Xi Zhang,Himanshu Arora,Yu Lou
title: Unsupervised Scene Sketch to Photo Synthesis
title_zh: 无监督场景草图到照片合成
abstract: Sketches make an intuitive and powerful visual expression as they are fast executed freehand drawings. We present a method for synthesizing realistic photos from scene sketches. Without the need for sketch and photo pairs, our framework directly learns from readily available large-scale photo datasets in an unsupervised manner. To this end, we introduce a standardization module that provides pseudo sketch-photo pairs during training by converting photos and sketches to a standardized domain, i.e. the edge map. The reduced domain gap between sketch and photo also allows us to disentangle them into two components: holistic scene structures and low-level visual styles such as color and texture. Taking this advantage, we synthesize a photo-realistic image by combining the structure of a sketch and the visual style of a reference photo. Extensive experimental results on perceptual similarity metrics and human perceptual studies show the proposed method could generate realistic photos with high fidelity from scene sketches and outperform state-of-the-art photo synthesis baselines. We also demonstrate that our framework facilitates a controllable manipulation of photo synthesis by editing strokes of corresponding sketches, delivering more fine-grained details than previous approaches that rely on region-level editing.
summary: Sketches make an intuitive and powerful visual expression as they are fast executed freehand drawings. We present a method for synthesizing realistic photos from scene sketches. Without the need for sketch and photo pairs, our framework directly learns from readily available large-scale photo datasets in an unsupervised manner. To this end, we introduce a standardization module that provides pseudo sketch-photo pairs during training by converting photos and sketches to a standardized domain, i.e. the edge map. The reduced domain gap between sketch and photo also allows us to disentangle them into two components: holistic scene structures and low-level visual styles such as color and texture. Taking this advantage, we synthesize a photo-realistic image by combining the structure of a sketch and the visual style of a reference photo. Extensive experimental results on perceptual similarity metrics and human perceptual studies show the proposed method could generate realistic photos with high fidelity from scene sketches and outperform state-of-the-art photo synthesis baselines. We also demonstrate that our framework facilitates a controllable manipulation of photo synthesis by editing strokes of corresponding sketches, delivering more fine-grained details than previous approaches that rely on region-level editing.
abstract_zh: 草图是一种直观且强大的视觉表达，因为它们是快速执行的手绘图。我们提出了一种从场景草图合成逼真照片的方法。不需要草图和照片对，我们的框架可以以无监督的方式直接从现成的大规模照片数据集中学习。为此，我们引入了一个标准化模块，该模块在训练期间通过将照片和草图转换为标准化域（即边缘图）来提供伪草图-照片对。草图和照片之间的域差距缩小也使我们能够将它们分解为两个组成部分：整体场景结构和低级视觉风格（例如颜色和纹理）。利用这一优势，我们通过结合草图的结构和参考照片的视觉风格来合成照片般逼真的图像。关于感知相似性指标和人类感知研究的大量实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以从场景草图生成高保真度的逼真照片，并且优于最先进的照片合成基线。我们还证明，我们的框架通过编辑相应草图的笔画来促进照片合成的可控操作，比以前依赖区域级编辑的方法提供更细粒度的细节。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种无需素描与照片配对的无监督方法，直接从大规模照片数据集中学习，将场景素描转换为真实感照片。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖素描与照片的成对数据，而实际中此类数据稀缺，且难以满足复杂场景的生成需求。
AI.method: 引入标准化模块将照片和素描转换为边缘图域，生成伪素描-照片对；通过分离场景结构与视觉风格，结合素描结构和参考照片风格生成图像。
AI.result: 在感知相似度指标和人类感知测试中优于现有方法，且支持通过编辑素描笔画实现细粒度控制。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了无监督场景素描到照片的合成问题，推动了可控图像生成技术的发展。

search_text: Unsupervised Scene Sketch to Photo Synthesis 无监督场景草图到照片合成 Sketches make an intuitive and powerful visual expression as they are fast executed freehand drawings. We present a method for synthesizing realistic photos from scene sketches. Without the need for sketch and photo pairs, our framework directly learns from readily available large-scale photo datasets in an unsupervised manner. To this end, we introduce a standardization module that provides pseudo sketch-photo pairs during training by converting photos and sketches to a standardized domain, i.e. the edge map. The reduced domain gap between sketch and photo also allows us to disentangle them into two components: holistic scene structures and low-level visual styles such as color and texture. Taking this advantage, we synthesize a photo-realistic image by combining the structure of a sketch and the visual style of a reference photo. Extensive experimental results on perceptual similarity metrics and human perceptual studies show the proposed method could generate realistic photos with high fidelity from scene sketches and outperform state-of-the-art photo synthesis baselines. We also demonstrate that our framework facilitates a controllable manipulation of photo synthesis by editing strokes of corresponding sketches, delivering more fine-grained details than previous approaches that rely on region-level editing. 草图是一种直观且强大的视觉表达，因为它们是快速执行的手绘图。我们提出了一种从场景草图合成逼真照片的方法。不需要草图和照片对，我们的框架可以以无监督的方式直接从现成的大规模照片数据集中学习。为此，我们引入了一个标准化模块，该模块在训练期间通过将照片和草图转换为标准化域（即边缘图）来提供伪草图-照片对。草图和照片之间的域差距缩小也使我们能够将它们分解为两个组成部分：整体场景结构和低级视觉风格（例如颜色和纹理）。利用这一优势，我们通过结合草图的结构和参考照片的视觉风格来合成照片般逼真的图像。关于感知相似性指标和人类感知研究的大量实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以从场景草图生成高保真度的逼真照片，并且优于最先进的照片合成基线。我们还证明，我们的框架通过编辑相应草图的笔画来促进照片合成的可控操作，比以前依赖区域级编辑的方法提供更细粒度的细节。 该论文提出了一种无需素描与照片配对的无监督方法，直接从大规模照片数据集中学习，将场景素描转换为真实感照片。 Jiayun Wang,Sangryul Jeon,Stella X. Yu,Xi Zhang,Himanshu Arora,Yu Lou cs.CV

authors_text: Chengyin Hu,Weiwen Shi
title: Impact of Colour Variation on Robustness of Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 颜色变化对深度神经网络鲁棒性的影响
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.02132
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.02132
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have have shown state-of-the-art performance for computer vision applications like image classification, segmentation and object detection. Whereas recent advances have shown their vulnerability to manual digital perturbations in the input data, namely adversarial attacks. The accuracy of the networks is significantly affected by the data distribution of their training dataset. Distortions or perturbations on color space of input images generates out-of-distribution data, which make networks more likely to misclassify them. In this work, we propose a color-variation dataset by distorting their RGB color on a subset of the ImageNet with 27 different combinations. The aim of our work is to study the impact of color variation on the performance of DNNs. We perform experiments on several state-of-the-art DNN architectures on the proposed dataset, and the result shows a significant correlation between color variation and loss of accuracy. Furthermore, based on the ResNet50 architecture, we demonstrate some experiments of the performance of recently proposed robust training techniques and strategies, such as Augmix, revisit, and free normalizer, on our proposed dataset. Experimental results indicate that these robust training techniques can improve the robustness of deep networks to color variation.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have have shown state-of-the-art performance for computer vision applications like image classification, segmentation and object detection. Whereas recent advances have shown their vulnerability to manual digital perturbations in the input data, namely adversarial attacks. The accuracy of the networks is significantly affected by the data distribution of their training dataset. Distortions or perturbations on color space of input images generates out-of-distribution data, which make networks more likely to misclassify them. In this work, we propose a color-variation dataset by distorting their RGB color on a subset of the ImageNet with 27 different combinations. The aim of our work is to study the impact of color variation on the performance of DNNs. We perform experiments on several state-of-the-art DNN architectures on the proposed dataset, and the result shows a significant correlation between color variation and loss of accuracy. Furthermore, based on the ResNet50 architecture, we demonstrate some experiments of the performance of recently proposed robust training techniques and strategies, such as Augmix, revisit, and free normalizer, on our proposed dataset. Experimental results indicate that these robust training techniques can improve the robustness of deep networks to color variation.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已在图像分类、分割和对象检测等计算机视觉应用中展现出最先进的性能。然而最近的进展表明它们容易受到输入数据中手动数字扰动的影响，即对抗性攻击。网络的准确性很大程度上受到训练数据集的数据分布的影响。输入图像颜色空间的扭曲或扰动会产生分布外的数据，这使得网络更有可能对它们进行错误分类。在这项工作中，我们通过使用 27 种不同的组合在 ImageNet 子集上扭曲 RGB 颜色，提出了一个颜色变化数据集。我们工作的目的是研究颜色变化对 DNN 性能的影响。我们在所提出的数据集上对几种最先进的 DNN 架构进行了实验，结果显示颜色变化和准确性损失之间存在显着相关性。此外，基于 ResNet50 架构，我们在我们提出的数据集上展示了最近提出的鲁棒训练技术和策略（例如 Augmix、revisit 和 free normalizer）的一些性能实验。实验结果表明，这些鲁棒的训练技术可以提高深度网络对颜色变化的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 研究颜色变化对深度神经网络性能的影响，并评估鲁棒训练技术的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络对对抗攻击敏感，而颜色空间扰动会导致数据分布偏移，进而影响模型准确性，需探索颜色变化的影响及应对策略。
AI.method: 构建包含27种RGB颜色组合的ImageNet子集数据集，测试多种DNN架构并分析颜色变化影响；基于ResNet50验证Augmix、revisit和free normalizer等鲁棒训练方法的效果。
AI.result: 颜色变化显著降低模型准确率，而鲁棒训练技术能有效提升网络对颜色扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 颜色变化是影响DNN性能的重要因素，采用鲁棒训练策略可缓解此类问题，为提升模型可靠性提供参考。

authors_text: Christos Mavridis,John Baras
title: Annealing Optimization for Progressive Learning with Stochastic Approximation
title_zh: 使用随机逼近的渐进式学习的退火优化
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2102.05836
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2102.05836
abstract: In this work, we introduce a learning model designed to meet the needs of applications in which computational resources are limited, and robustness and interpretability are prioritized. Learning problems can be formulated as constrained stochastic optimization problems, with the constraints originating mainly from model assumptions that define a trade-off between complexity and performance. This trade-off is closely related to over-fitting, generalization capacity, and robustness to noise and adversarial attacks, and depends on both the structure and complexity of the model, as well as the properties of the optimization methods used. We develop an online prototype-based learning algorithm based on annealing optimization that is formulated as an online gradient-free stochastic approximation algorithm. The learning model can be viewed as an interpretable and progressively growing competitive-learning neural network model to be used for supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning. The annealing nature of the algorithm contributes to minimal hyper-parameter tuning requirements, poor local minima prevention, and robustness with respect to the initial conditions. At the same time, it provides online control over the performance-complexity trade-off by progressively increasing the complexity of the learning model as needed, through an intuitive bifurcation phenomenon. Finally, the use of stochastic approximation enables the study of the convergence of the learning algorithm through mathematical tools from dynamical systems and control, and allows for its integration with reinforcement learning algorithms, constructing an adaptive state-action aggregation scheme.
summary: In this work, we introduce a learning model designed to meet the needs of applications in which computational resources are limited, and robustness and interpretability are prioritized. Learning problems can be formulated as constrained stochastic optimization problems, with the constraints originating mainly from model assumptions that define a trade-off between complexity and performance. This trade-off is closely related to over-fitting, generalization capacity, and robustness to noise and adversarial attacks, and depends on both the structure and complexity of the model, as well as the properties of the optimization methods used. We develop an online prototype-based learning algorithm based on annealing optimization that is formulated as an online gradient-free stochastic approximation algorithm. The learning model can be viewed as an interpretable and progressively growing competitive-learning neural network model to be used for supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning. The annealing nature of the algorithm contributes to minimal hyper-parameter tuning requirements, poor local minima prevention, and robustness with respect to the initial conditions. At the same time, it provides online control over the performance-complexity trade-off by progressively increasing the complexity of the learning model as needed, through an intuitive bifurcation phenomenon. Finally, the use of stochastic approximation enables the study of the convergence of the learning algorithm through mathematical tools from dynamical systems and control, and allows for its integration with reinforcement learning algorithms, constructing an adaptive state-action aggregation scheme.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们引入了一种学习模型，旨在满足计算资源有限的应用程序的需求，并优先考虑鲁棒性和可解释性。学习问题可以表述为约束随机优化问题，约束主要源自定义复杂性和性能之间权衡的模型假设。这种权衡与过拟合、泛化能力以及对噪声和对抗性攻击的鲁棒性密切相关，并且取决于模型的结构和复杂性以及所使用的优化方法的属性。我们开发了一种基于退火优化的在线原型学习算法，该算法被制定为在线无梯度随机逼近算法。该学习模型可以被视为一种可解释且逐步增长的竞争学习神经网络模型，可用于监督学习、无监督学习和强化学习。该算法的退火性质有助于最小的超参数调整要求、较差的局部极小值预防以及相对于初始条件的鲁棒性。同时，它通过直观的分叉现象，根据需要逐步增加学习模型的复杂性，提供对性能与复杂性权衡的在线控制。最后，随机逼近的使用使得能够通过动力系统和控制的数学工具来研究学习算法的收敛性，并允许其与强化学习算法集成，构建自适应状态动作聚合方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于退火优化和随机逼近的在线原型学习算法，用于资源受限场景下的鲁棒且可解释的渐进式学习。
AI.motivation: 针对计算资源有限的应用场景，需在模型复杂度与性能间取得平衡，解决过拟合、泛化能力及对抗噪声的鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: 开发了一种无需梯度的在线退火优化算法，结合随机逼近理论，通过竞争学习神经网络实现监督、无监督及强化学习，并利用分岔现象动态调整模型复杂度。
AI.result: 算法具备最小超参数调优需求、避免局部最优及初始条件鲁棒性，同时通过动态系统工具证明收敛性，并与强化学习集成实现自适应状态-动作聚合。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为资源受限场景提供了可解释的渐进式学习框架，在性能-复杂度权衡、鲁棒性及收敛性分析方面具有显著优势。

search_text: Annealing Optimization for Progressive Learning with Stochastic Approximation 使用随机逼近的渐进式学习的退火优化 In this work, we introduce a learning model designed to meet the needs of applications in which computational resources are limited, and robustness and interpretability are prioritized. Learning problems can be formulated as constrained stochastic optimization problems, with the constraints originating mainly from model assumptions that define a trade-off between complexity and performance. This trade-off is closely related to over-fitting, generalization capacity, and robustness to noise and adversarial attacks, and depends on both the structure and complexity of the model, as well as the properties of the optimization methods used. We develop an online prototype-based learning algorithm based on annealing optimization that is formulated as an online gradient-free stochastic approximation algorithm. The learning model can be viewed as an interpretable and progressively growing competitive-learning neural network model to be used for supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning. The annealing nature of the algorithm contributes to minimal hyper-parameter tuning requirements, poor local minima prevention, and robustness with respect to the initial conditions. At the same time, it provides online control over the performance-complexity trade-off by progressively increasing the complexity of the learning model as needed, through an intuitive bifurcation phenomenon. Finally, the use of stochastic approximation enables the study of the convergence of the learning algorithm through mathematical tools from dynamical systems and control, and allows for its integration with reinforcement learning algorithms, constructing an adaptive state-action aggregation scheme. 在这项工作中，我们引入了一种学习模型，旨在满足计算资源有限的应用程序的需求，并优先考虑鲁棒性和可解释性。学习问题可以表述为约束随机优化问题，约束主要源自定义复杂性和性能之间权衡的模型假设。这种权衡与过拟合、泛化能力以及对噪声和对抗性攻击的鲁棒性密切相关，并且取决于模型的结构和复杂性以及所使用的优化方法的属性。我们开发了一种基于退火优化的在线原型学习算法，该算法被制定为在线无梯度随机逼近算法。该学习模型可以被视为一种可解释且逐步增长的竞争学习神经网络模型，可用于监督学习、无监督学习和强化学习。该算法的退火性质有助于最小的超参数调整要求、较差的局部极小值预防以及相对于初始条件的鲁棒性。同时，它通过直观的分叉现象，根据需要逐步增加学习模型的复杂性，提供对性能与复杂性权衡的在线控制。最后，随机逼近的使用使得能够通过动力系统和控制的数学工具来研究学习算法的收敛性，并允许其与强化学习算法集成，构建自适应状态动作聚合方案。 本文提出一种基于退火优化和随机逼近的在线原型学习算法，用于资源受限场景下的鲁棒且可解释的渐进式学习。 Christos Mavridis,John Baras eess.SY,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Haozheng Zhang,Edmond S. L. Ho,Hubert P. H. Shum
title: CP-AGCN: Pytorch-based Attention Informed Graph Convolutional Network for Identifying Infants at Risk of Cerebral Palsy
title_zh: CP-AGCN：基于 Pytorch 的注意力通知图卷积网络，用于识别有脑瘫风险的婴儿
abstract: Early prediction is clinically considered one of the essential parts of cerebral palsy (CP) treatment. We propose to implement a low-cost and interpretable classification system for supporting CP prediction based on General Movement Assessment (GMA). We design a Pytorch-based attention-informed graph convolutional network to early identify infants at risk of CP from skeletal data extracted from RGB videos. We also design a frequency-binning module for learning the CP movements in the frequency domain while filtering noise. Our system only requires consumer-grade RGB videos for training to support interactive-time CP prediction by providing an interpretable CP classification result.
summary: Early prediction is clinically considered one of the essential parts of cerebral palsy (CP) treatment. We propose to implement a low-cost and interpretable classification system for supporting CP prediction based on General Movement Assessment (GMA). We design a Pytorch-based attention-informed graph convolutional network to early identify infants at risk of CP from skeletal data extracted from RGB videos. We also design a frequency-binning module for learning the CP movements in the frequency domain while filtering noise. Our system only requires consumer-grade RGB videos for training to support interactive-time CP prediction by providing an interpretable CP classification result.
abstract_zh: 早期预测在临床上被认为是脑瘫（CP）治疗的重要部分之一。我们建议实施一个低成本且可解释的分类系统，以支持基于一般运动评估（GMA）的 CP 预测。我们设计了一个基于 Pytorch 的注意力通知图卷积网络，通过从 RGB 视频中提取的骨骼数据来早期识别有 CP 风险的婴儿。我们还设计了一个频率合并模块，用于在过滤噪声的同时学习频域中的 CP 运动。我们的系统只需要消费级 RGB 视频进行训练，即可通过提供可解释的 CP 分类结果来支持交互时间 CP 预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的图卷积网络（CP-AGCN），利用RGB视频中的骨骼数据预测婴儿脑瘫风险。
AI.motivation: 脑瘫早期预测对临床治疗至关重要，但现有方法成本高或缺乏可解释性。本文旨在开发一种低成本、可解释的分类系统，利用消费级RGB视频实现实时预测。
AI.method: 设计基于PyTorch的注意力机制图卷积网络，结合频率分箱模块在频域学习运动特征并过滤噪声，仅需RGB视频即可完成训练与预测。
AI.result: 系统在骨骼数据上实现了有效的脑瘫风险分类，提供可解释的预测结果，验证了方法在准确率和实用性上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为脑瘫早期筛查提供了高效、低成本的解决方案，未来可进一步优化模型鲁棒性并扩展至更多临床场景。

authors_text: Jeff Calder,Reed Coil,Annie Melton,Peter J. Olver,Gilbert Tostevin,Katrina Yezzi-Woodley
title: Use and Misuse of Machine Learning in Anthropology
title_zh: 机器学习在人类学中的使用和误用
abstract: Machine learning (ML), being now widely accessible to the research community at large, has fostered a proliferation of new and striking applications of these emergent mathematical techniques across a wide range of disciplines. In this paper, we will focus on a particular case study: the field of paleoanthropology, which seeks to understand the evolution of the human species based on biological and cultural evidence. As we will show, the easy availability of ML algorithms and lack of expertise on their proper use among the anthropological research community has led to foundational misapplications that have appeared throughout the literature. The resulting unreliable results not only undermine efforts to legitimately incorporate ML into anthropological research, but produce potentially faulty understandings about our human evolutionary and behavioral past. The aim of this paper is to provide a brief introduction to some of the ways in which ML has been applied within paleoanthropology; we also include a survey of some basic ML algorithms for those who are not fully conversant with the field, which remains under active development. We discuss a series of missteps, errors, and violations of correct protocols of ML methods that appear disconcertingly often within the accumulating body of anthropological literature. These mistakes include use of outdated algorithms and practices; inappropriate train/test splits, sample composition, and textual explanations; as well as an absence of transparency due to the lack of data/code sharing, and the subsequent limitations imposed on independent replication. We assert that expanding samples, sharing data and code, re-evaluating approaches to peer review, and, most importantly, developing interdisciplinary teams that include experts in ML are all necessary for progress in future research incorporating ML within anthropology.
summary: Machine learning (ML), being now widely accessible to the research community at large, has fostered a proliferation of new and striking applications of these emergent mathematical techniques across a wide range of disciplines. In this paper, we will focus on a particular case study: the field of paleoanthropology, which seeks to understand the evolution of the human species based on biological and cultural evidence. As we will show, the easy availability of ML algorithms and lack of expertise on their proper use among the anthropological research community has led to foundational misapplications that have appeared throughout the literature. The resulting unreliable results not only undermine efforts to legitimately incorporate ML into anthropological research, but produce potentially faulty understandings about our human evolutionary and behavioral past. The aim of this paper is to provide a brief introduction to some of the ways in which ML has been applied within paleoanthropology; we also include a survey of some basic ML algorithms for those who are not fully conversant with the field, which remains under active development. We discuss a series of missteps, errors, and violations of correct protocols of ML methods that appear disconcertingly often within the accumulating body of anthropological literature. These mistakes include use of outdated algorithms and practices; inappropriate train/test splits, sample composition, and textual explanations; as well as an absence of transparency due to the lack of data/code sharing, and the subsequent limitations imposed on independent replication. We assert that expanding samples, sharing data and code, re-evaluating approaches to peer review, and, most importantly, developing interdisciplinary teams that include experts in ML are all necessary for progress in future research incorporating ML within anthropology.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 现在已被广大研究界广泛使用，促进了这些新兴数学技术在各个学科中的新的、引人注目的应用的激增。在本文中，我们将重点关注一个特定的案例研究：古人类学领域，该领域旨在根据生物和文化证据了解人类物种的进化。正如我们将要展示的，机器学习算法的易用性以及人类学研究界缺乏正确使用算法的专业知识，导致了文献中出现的根本性误用。由此产生的不可靠结果不仅破坏了将机器学习合法地纳入人类学研究的努力，而且还对我们人类的进化和行为过去产生了潜在的错误理解。本文的目的是简要介绍机器学习在古人类学中的一些应用方式；我们还为那些不完全熟悉该领域的人提供了一些基本机器学习算法的调查，该领域仍在积极开发中。我们讨论了一系列错误、错误和违反机器学习方法正确协议的行为，这些错误在不断积累的人类学文献中经常出现，令人不安。这些错误包括使用过时的算法和实践；不适当的训练/测试分割、样本组成和文字解释；以及由于缺乏数据/代码共享而缺乏透明度，以及随后对独立复制施加的限制。我们断言，扩大样本、共享数据和代码、重新评估同行评审方法，以及最重要的是，发展包括机器学习专家在内的跨学科团队，对于将机器学习纳入人类学的未来研究取得进展都是必要的。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了机器学习在人类学中的应用与误用，重点分析了其在古人类学研究中的不当实践及潜在影响。
AI.motivation: 机器学习技术的普及使古人类学研究面临方法误用风险，导致不可靠结论，阻碍学科发展并可能扭曲人类进化认知。
AI.method: 通过案例研究梳理机器学习在古人类学中的应用现状，分析文献中常见错误（如过时算法、数据分割不当等），并提出改进方向。
AI.result: 发现研究者普遍缺乏ML专业知识，存在算法选择不当、数据透明度不足、缺乏独立验证等问题，需加强跨学科合作与数据共享。
AI.conclusion: 未来需扩大样本量、共享数据代码、改革同行评审机制，并组建包含ML专家的跨学科团队以提升研究可靠性。

We discuss a series of missteps, errors, and violations of correct protocols of ML methods that appear disconcertingly often within the accumulating body of anthropological literature. These mistakes include use of outdated algorithms and practices; inappropriate train/test splits, sample composition, and textual explanations; as well as an absence of transparency due to the lack of data/code sharing, and the subsequent limitations imposed on independent replication. We assert that expanding samples, sharing data and code, re-evaluating approaches to peer review, and, most importantly, developing interdisciplinary teams that include experts in ML are all necessary for progress in future research incorporating ML within anthropology. 机器学习 (ML) 现在已被广大研究界广泛使用，促进了这些新兴数学技术在各个学科中的新的、引人注目的应用的激增。在本文中，我们将重点关注一个特定的案例研究：古人类学领域，该领域旨在根据生物和文化证据了解人类物种的进化。正如我们将要展示的，机器学习算法的易用性以及人类学研究界缺乏正确使用算法的专业知识，导致了文献中出现的根本性误用。由此产生的不可靠结果不仅破坏了将机器学习合法地纳入人类学研究的努力，而且还对我们人类的进化和行为过去产生了潜在的错误理解。本文的目的是简要介绍机器学习在古人类学中的一些应用方式；我们还为那些不完全熟悉该领域的人提供了一些基本机器学习算法的调查，该领域仍在积极开发中。我们讨论了一系列错误、错误和违反机器学习方法正确协议的行为，这些错误在不断积累的人类学文献中经常出现，令人不安。这些错误包括使用过时的算法和实践；不适当的训练/测试分割、样本组成和文字解释；以及由于缺乏数据/代码共享而缺乏透明度，以及随后对独立复制施加的限制。我们断言，扩大样本、共享数据和代码、重新评估同行评审方法，以及最重要的是，发展包括机器学习专家在内的跨学科团队，对于将机器学习纳入人类学的未来研究取得进展都是必要的。 本文探讨了机器学习在人类学中的应用与误用，重点分析了其在古人类学研究中的不当实践及潜在影响。 Jeff Calder,Reed Coil,Annie Melton,Peter J. Olver,Gilbert Tostevin,Katrina Yezzi-Woodley cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: William Maillet,Maryam Ouhami,Adel Hafiane
title: Fusion of Satellite Images and Weather Data with Transformer Networks for Downy Mildew Disease Detection
title_zh: 将卫星图像和天气数据与变压器网络融合以检测霜霉病
abstract: Crop diseases significantly affect the quantity and quality of agricultural production. In a context where the goal of precision agriculture is to minimize or even avoid the use of pesticides, weather and remote sensing data with deep learning can play a pivotal role in detecting crop diseases, allowing localized treatment of crops. However, combining heterogeneous data such as weather and images remains a hot topic and challenging task. Recent developments in transformer architectures have shown the possibility of fusion of data from different domains, for instance text-image. The current trend is to custom only one transformer to create a multimodal fusion model. Conversely, we propose a new approach to realize data fusion using three transformers. In this paper, we first solved the missing satellite images problem, by interpolating them with a ConvLSTM model. Then, proposed a multimodal fusion architecture that jointly learns to process visual and weather information. The architecture is built from three main components, a Vision Transformer and two transformer-encoders, allowing to fuse both image and weather modalities. The results of the proposed method are promising achieving 97\% overall accuracy.
summary: Crop diseases significantly affect the quantity and quality of agricultural production. In a context where the goal of precision agriculture is to minimize or even avoid the use of pesticides, weather and remote sensing data with deep learning can play a pivotal role in detecting crop diseases, allowing localized treatment of crops. However, combining heterogeneous data such as weather and images remains a hot topic and challenging task. Recent developments in transformer architectures have shown the possibility of fusion of data from different domains, for instance text-image. The current trend is to custom only one transformer to create a multimodal fusion model. Conversely, we propose a new approach to realize data fusion using three transformers. In this paper, we first solved the missing satellite images problem, by interpolating them with a ConvLSTM model. Then, proposed a multimodal fusion architecture that jointly learns to process visual and weather information. The architecture is built from three main components, a Vision Transformer and two transformer-encoders, allowing to fuse both image and weather modalities. The results of the proposed method are promising achieving 97\% overall accuracy.
abstract_zh: 农作物病害严重影响农业生产的数量和质量。在精准农业的目标是尽量减少甚至避免使用农药的背景下，具有深度学习的天气和遥感数据可以在检测作物病害方面发挥关键作用，从而实现对作物的局部治疗。然而，结合天气和图像等异构数据仍然是一个热门话题和具有挑战性的任务。变压器架构的最新发展表明了融合不同领域数据（例如文本图像）的可能性。当前的趋势是仅定制一个变压器来创建多模态融合模型。相反，我们提出了一种使用三个变压器实现数据融合的新方法。在本文中，我们首先通过使用 ConvLSTM 模型对卫星图像进行插值来解决卫星图像丢失的问题。然后，提出了一种多模态融合架构，共同学习处理视觉和天气信息。该架构由三个主要组件组成，一个视觉变压器和两个变压器编码器，允许融合图像和天气模式。该方法的结果有望实现 97% 的总体准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用Transformer网络融合卫星图像和天气数据以检测霜霉病的方法。
AI.motivation: 精准农业需要减少农药使用，而现有方法在融合卫星图像与天气数据等异构信息方面存在挑战，需更有效的多模态融合技术。
AI.method: 采用ConvLSTM填补卫星图像缺失，构建包含视觉Transformer和两个Transformer编码器的多模态融合架构，实现图像与天气数据的联合处理。
AI.result: 方法在检测中达到97%的总体准确率，效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 多Transformer结构有效融合异构数据，为精准农业中的病害检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ioannis Polykretis,Lazar Supic,Andreea Danielescu
title: Bioinspired Smooth Neuromorphic Control for Robotic Arms
title_zh: 机械臂的仿生平滑神经形态控制
abstract: Beyond providing accurate movements, achieving smooth motion trajectories is a long-standing goal of robotics control theory for arms aiming to replicate natural human movements. Drawing inspiration from biological agents, whose reaching control networks effortlessly give rise to smooth and precise movements, can simplify these control objectives for robot arms. Neuromorphic processors, which mimic the brain's computational principles, are an ideal platform to approximate the accuracy and smoothness of biological controllers while maximizing their energy efficiency and robustness. However, the incompatibility of conventional control methods with neuromorphic hardware limits the computational efficiency and explainability of their existing adaptations. In contrast, the neuronal subnetworks underlying smooth and accurate reaching movements are effective, minimal, and inherently compatible with neuromorphic hardware. In this work, we emulate these networks with a biologically realistic spiking neural network for motor control on neuromorphic hardware. The proposed controller incorporates experimentally-identified short-term synaptic plasticity and specialized neurons that regulate sensory feedback gain to provide smooth and accurate joint control across a wide motion range. Concurrently, it preserves the minimal complexity of its biological counterpart and is directly deployable on Intel's neuromorphic processor. Using the joint controller as a building block and inspired by joint coordination in human arms, we scaled up this approach to control real-world robot arms. The trajectories and smooth, bell-shaped velocity profiles of the resulting motions resembled those of humans, verifying the biological relevance of the controller. Notably, the method achieved state-of-the-art control performance while decreasing the motion jerk by 19% to improve motion smoothness.
summary: Beyond providing accurate movements, achieving smooth motion trajectories is a long-standing goal of robotics control theory for arms aiming to replicate natural human movements. Drawing inspiration from biological agents, whose reaching control networks effortlessly give rise to smooth and precise movements, can simplify these control objectives for robot arms. Neuromorphic processors, which mimic the brain's computational principles, are an ideal platform to approximate the accuracy and smoothness of biological controllers while maximizing their energy efficiency and robustness. However, the incompatibility of conventional control methods with neuromorphic hardware limits the computational efficiency and explainability of their existing adaptations. In contrast, the neuronal subnetworks underlying smooth and accurate reaching movements are effective, minimal, and inherently compatible with neuromorphic hardware. In this work, we emulate these networks with a biologically realistic spiking neural network for motor control on neuromorphic hardware. The proposed controller incorporates experimentally-identified short-term synaptic plasticity and specialized neurons that regulate sensory feedback gain to provide smooth and accurate joint control across a wide motion range. Concurrently, it preserves the minimal complexity of its biological counterpart and is directly deployable on Intel's neuromorphic processor. Using the joint controller as a building block and inspired by joint coordination in human arms, we scaled up this approach to control real-world robot arms. The trajectories and smooth, bell-shaped velocity profiles of the resulting motions resembled those of humans, verifying the biological relevance of the controller. Notably, the method achieved state-of-the-art control performance while decreasing the motion jerk by 19% to improve motion smoothness.
abstract_zh: 除了提供准确的运动之外，实现平滑的运动轨迹是旨在复制自然人类运动的手臂机器人控制理论的长期目标。从生物体中汲取灵感，其控制网络可以毫不费力地产生平稳而精确的运动，可以简化机器人手臂的控制目标。神经形态处理器模仿大脑的计算原理，是一个理想的平台，可以近似生物控制器的准确性和平滑性，同时最大限度地提高其能源效率和鲁棒性。然而，传统控制方法与神经形态硬件的不兼容限制了其现有适应的计算效率和可解释性。相比之下，平滑、准确的到达运动背后的神经元子网络是有效的、最小的，并且本质上与神经形态硬件兼容。在这项工作中，我们使用生物真实的尖峰神经网络来模拟这些网络，用于神经形态硬件上的运动控制。所提出的控制器结合了实验确定的短期突触可塑性和调节感觉反馈增益的专门神经元，以在广泛的运动范围内提供平滑和准确的关节控制。同时，它保留了其生物对应物的最低复杂性，并且可以直接部署在英特尔的神经形态处理器上。使用关节控制器作为构建块，并受到人类手臂关节协调的启发，我们扩大了这种方法来控制现实世界的机器人手臂。由此产生的运动的轨迹和平滑的钟形速度曲线与人类相似，验证了控制器的生物相关性。值得注意的是，该方法实现了最先进的控制性能，同时将运动急动度降低了 19%，从而提高了运动平滑度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生物启发的神经形态控制方法，用于实现机械臂的平滑运动轨迹控制。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法难以与神经形态硬件兼容，限制了计算效率和可解释性，而生物神经系统能自然产生平滑精确的运动，需将其特性移植到机械臂控制中。
AI.method: 构建生物逼真的脉冲神经网络，集成短期突触可塑性和反馈增益调节神经元，并在英特尔神经形态处理器上直接部署该控制器。
AI.result: 实现类人运动轨迹和钟形速度曲线，运动 jerk 降低19%，达到最优控制性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了生物启发控制器在神经形态硬件上的有效性，为机械臂提供了兼具平滑性与能效的新型控制方案。

Using the joint controller as a building block and inspired by joint coordination in human arms, we scaled up this approach to control real-world robot arms. The trajectories and smooth, bell-shaped velocity profiles of the resulting motions resembled those of humans, verifying the biological relevance of the controller. Notably, the method achieved state-of-the-art control performance while decreasing the motion jerk by 19% to improve motion smoothness. 除了提供准确的运动之外，实现平滑的运动轨迹是旨在复制自然人类运动的手臂机器人控制理论的长期目标。从生物体中汲取灵感，其控制网络可以毫不费力地产生平稳而精确的运动，可以简化机器人手臂的控制目标。神经形态处理器模仿大脑的计算原理，是一个理想的平台，可以近似生物控制器的准确性和平滑性，同时最大限度地提高其能源效率和鲁棒性。然而，传统控制方法与神经形态硬件的不兼容限制了其现有适应的计算效率和可解释性。相比之下，平滑、准确的到达运动背后的神经元子网络是有效的、最小的，并且本质上与神经形态硬件兼容。在这项工作中，我们使用生物真实的尖峰神经网络来模拟这些网络，用于神经形态硬件上的运动控制。所提出的控制器结合了实验确定的短期突触可塑性和调节感觉反馈增益的专门神经元，以在广泛的运动范围内提供平滑和准确的关节控制。同时，它保留了其生物对应物的最低复杂性，并且可以直接部署在英特尔的神经形态处理器上。使用关节控制器作为构建块，并受到人类手臂关节协调的启发，我们扩大了这种方法来控制现实世界的机器人手臂。由此产生的运动的轨迹和平滑的钟形速度曲线与人类相似，验证了控制器的生物相关性。值得注意的是，该方法实现了最先进的控制性能，同时将运动急动度降低了 19%，从而提高了运动平滑度。 本文提出一种基于生物启发的神经形态控制方法，用于实现机械臂的平滑运动轨迹控制。 Ioannis Polykretis,Lazar Supic,Andreea Danielescu cs.RO,cs.ET,eess.SY,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Rishibha Bansal
title: Read it to me: An emotionally aware Speech Narration Application
title_zh: 读给我听：情感感知的语音旁白应用程序
abstract: In this work we try to perform emotional style transfer on audios. In particular, MelGAN-VC architecture is explored for various emotion-pair transfers. The generated audio is then classified using an LSTM-based emotion classifier for audio. We find that "sad" audio is generated well as compared to "happy" or "anger" as people have similar expressions of sadness.
summary: In this work we try to perform emotional style transfer on audios. In particular, MelGAN-VC architecture is explored for various emotion-pair transfers. The generated audio is then classified using an LSTM-based emotion classifier for audio. We find that "sad" audio is generated well as compared to "happy" or "anger" as people have similar expressions of sadness.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们尝试在音频上进行情感风格转移。特别是，MelGAN-VC 架构被探索用于各种情感对传输。然后使用基于 LSTM 的音频情感分类器对生成的音频进行分类。我们发现，与“快乐”或“愤怒”相比，“悲伤”音频的生成效果更好，因为人们有类似的悲伤表达。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过MelGAN-VC架构实现音频情感风格迁移，并利用LSTM分类器评估生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有情感迁移方法在生成特定情绪（如悲伤）时效果有限，需探索更有效的模型与评估方式。
AI.method: 采用MelGAN-VC进行多组情感对的音频风格迁移，结合LSTM情感分类器量化生成结果。
AI.result: 模型在生成悲伤音频时表现优于快乐或愤怒，因人类悲伤表达更具相似性。
AI.conclusion: 情感迁移效果受人类情感表达共性影响，未来需优化模型以提升复杂情绪生成质量。

authors_text: Melissa A. Schoenlein,Johnny Campos,Kevin J. Lande,Laurent Lessard,Karen B. Schloss
title: Unifying Effects of Direct and Relational Associations for Visual Communication
title_zh: 视觉传达中直接关联和关系关联的统一效果
comment: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
comments: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
abstract: People have expectations about how colors map to concepts in visualizations, and they are better at interpreting visualizations that match their expectations. Traditionally, studies on these expectations (inferred mappings) distinguished distinct factors relevant for visualizations of categorical vs. continuous information. Studies on categorical information focused on direct associations (e.g., mangos are associated with yellows) whereas studies on continuous information focused on relational associations (e.g., darker colors map to larger quantities; dark-is-more bias). We unite these two areas within a single framework of assignment inference. Assignment inference is the process by which people infer mappings between perceptual features and concepts represented in encoding systems. Observers infer globally optimal assignments by maximizing the "merit," or "goodness," of each possible assignment. Previous work on assignment inference focused on visualizations of categorical information. We extend this approach to visualizations of continuous data by (a) broadening the notion of merit to include relational associations and (b) developing a method for combining multiple (sometimes conflicting) sources of merit to predict people's inferred mappings. We developed and tested our model on data from experiments in which participants interpreted colormap data visualizations, representing fictitious data about environmental concepts (sunshine, shade, wild fire, ocean water, glacial ice). We found both direct and relational associations contribute independently to inferred mappings. These results can be used to optimize visualization design to facilitate visual communication.
summary: People have expectations about how colors map to concepts in visualizations, and they are better at interpreting visualizations that match their expectations. Traditionally, studies on these expectations (inferred mappings) distinguished distinct factors relevant for visualizations of categorical vs. continuous information. Studies on categorical information focused on direct associations (e.g., mangos are associated with yellows) whereas studies on continuous information focused on relational associations (e.g., darker colors map to larger quantities; dark-is-more bias). We unite these two areas within a single framework of assignment inference. Assignment inference is the process by which people infer mappings between perceptual features and concepts represented in encoding systems. Observers infer globally optimal assignments by maximizing the "merit," or "goodness," of each possible assignment. Previous work on assignment inference focused on visualizations of categorical information. We extend this approach to visualizations of continuous data by (a) broadening the notion of merit to include relational associations and (b) developing a method for combining multiple (sometimes conflicting) sources of merit to predict people's inferred mappings. We developed and tested our model on data from experiments in which participants interpreted colormap data visualizations, representing fictitious data about environmental concepts (sunshine, shade, wild fire, ocean water, glacial ice). We found both direct and relational associations contribute independently to inferred mappings. These results can be used to optimize visualization design to facilitate visual communication.
abstract_zh: 人们对颜色如何映射到可视化中的概念抱有期望，并且他们更擅长解释符合他们期望的可视化。传统上，对这些期望（推断映射）的研究区分了与分类信息和连续信息可视化相关的不同因素。对分类信息的研究侧重于直接关联（例如，芒果与黄色相关），而对连续信息的研究则侧重于关系关联（例如，较深的颜色映射到较大的数量；深色即更多偏差）。我们将这两个领域结合在一个分配推理的单一框架内。分配推理是人们推断感知特征和编码系统中表示的概念之间的映射的过程。观察者通过最大化每个可能分配的“优点”或“优点”来推断全局最优分配。之前关于分配推理的工作主要集中在分类信息的可视化上。我们通过以下方式将这种方法扩展到连续数据的可视化：（a）扩大优点的概念以包括关系关联；（b）开发一种方法来组合多个（有时是冲突的）优点来源来预测人们的推断映射。我们根据实验数据开发并测试了我们的模型，在这些实验中，参与者解释了色彩图数据可视化，代表了有关环境概念（阳光、阴影、野火、海水、冰川）的虚构数据。我们发现直接关联和关系关联都独立地对推断映射做出贡献。这些结果可用于优化可视化设计，以促进视觉传达。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一框架，将直接关联与关系关联整合到视觉通信的映射推断中，以优化可视化设计。
AI.motivation: 传统研究将分类信息（直接关联）与连续信息（关系关联）分开，导致对视觉映射理解的碎片化。作者旨在建立统一模型以提升可视化设计效果。
AI.method: 扩展了映射推断理论，将关系关联纳入‘价值’计算，并开发多源价值整合方法。通过实验验证模型，参与者解读环境概念的色图数据。
AI.result: 实验证实直接关联与关系关联独立影响映射推断，二者结合可提升可视化解读准确性。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架有效整合两种关联类型，为优化视觉通信设计提供理论支持与实践指导。

authors_text: Jiayuan Gu,Devendra Singh Chaplot,Hao Su,Jitendra Malik
title: Multi-skill Mobile Manipulation for Object Rearrangement
title_zh: 用于对象重新排列的多技能移动操作
abstract: We study a modular approach to tackle long-horizon mobile manipulation tasks for object rearrangement, which decomposes a full task into a sequence of subtasks. To tackle the entire task, prior work chains multiple stationary manipulation skills with a point-goal navigation skill, which are learned individually on subtasks. Although more effective than monolithic end-to-end RL policies, this framework suffers from compounding errors in skill chaining, e.g., navigating to a bad location where a stationary manipulation skill can not reach its target to manipulate. To this end, we propose that the manipulation skills should include mobility to have flexibility in interacting with the target object from multiple locations and at the same time the navigation skill could have multiple end points which lead to successful manipulation. We operationalize these ideas by implementing mobile manipulation skills rather than stationary ones and training a navigation skill trained with region goal instead of point goal. We evaluate our multi-skill mobile manipulation method M3 on 3 challenging long-horizon mobile manipulation tasks in the Home Assistant Benchmark (HAB), and show superior performance as compared to the baselines.
summary: We study a modular approach to tackle long-horizon mobile manipulation tasks for object rearrangement, which decomposes a full task into a sequence of subtasks. To tackle the entire task, prior work chains multiple stationary manipulation skills with a point-goal navigation skill, which are learned individually on subtasks. Although more effective than monolithic end-to-end RL policies, this framework suffers from compounding errors in skill chaining, e.g., navigating to a bad location where a stationary manipulation skill can not reach its target to manipulate. To this end, we propose that the manipulation skills should include mobility to have flexibility in interacting with the target object from multiple locations and at the same time the navigation skill could have multiple end points which lead to successful manipulation. We operationalize these ideas by implementing mobile manipulation skills rather than stationary ones and training a navigation skill trained with region goal instead of point goal. We evaluate our multi-skill mobile manipulation method M3 on 3 challenging long-horizon mobile manipulation tasks in the Home Assistant Benchmark (HAB), and show superior performance as compared to the baselines.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一种模块化方法来处理用于对象重新排列的长视野移动操作任务，该方法将完整任务分解为一系列子任务。为了解决整个任务，之前的工作将多种固定操作技能与点目标导航技能联系起来，这些技能是在子任务中单独学习的。尽管比单一的端到端强化学习策略更有效，但该框架在技能链中遇到了复合错误，例如，导航到固定操纵技能无法达到其操纵目标的不良位置。为此，我们建议操纵技能应包括移动性，以便能够灵活地从多个位置与目标对象进行交互，同时导航技能可以具有多个端点，从而实现成功的操纵。我们通过实施移动操纵技能而不是固定操纵技能并训练以区域目标而不是点目标训练的导航技能来实施这些想法。我们在家庭助理基准 (HAB) 中对 3 个具有挑战性的长视野移动操作任务评估了我们的多技能移动操作方法 M3，并显示出与基线相比的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种模块化方法，通过结合移动机械臂的导航与操作技能，解决复杂场景下的物体重排任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过串联固定操作技能与点目标导航技能存在误差累积问题，导致导航位置可能无法支持后续操作。
AI.method: 采用可移动操作技能替代固定技能，并训练基于区域目标而非点目标的导航技能，提升任务执行的灵活性。
AI.result: 在Home Assistant Benchmark的3个复杂任务中，M3方法性能优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过集成移动操作能力与区域导航目标，有效缓解了技能串联中的误差累积问题，提升了长时序任务的完成效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种模块化方法，通过结合移动机械臂的导航与操作技能，解决复杂场景下的物体重排任务。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法通过串联固定操作技能与点目标导航技能存在误差累积问题，导致导航位置可能无法支持后续操作。
ai_content.method: 采用可移动操作技能替代固定技能，并训练基于区域目标而非点目标的导航技能，提升任务执行的灵活性。
ai_content.result: 在Home Assistant Benchmark的3个复杂任务中，M3方法性能优于基线方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过集成移动操作能力与区域导航目标，有效缓解了技能串联中的误差累积问题，提升了长时序任务的完成效果。

search_text: Multi-skill Mobile Manipulation for Object Rearrangement 用于对象重新排列的多技能移动操作 We study a modular approach to tackle long-horizon mobile manipulation tasks for object rearrangement, which decomposes a full task into a sequence of subtasks. To tackle the entire task, prior work chains multiple stationary manipulation skills with a point-goal navigation skill, which are learned individually on subtasks. Although more effective than monolithic end-to-end RL policies, this framework suffers from compounding errors in skill chaining, e.g., navigating to a bad location where a stationary manipulation skill can not reach its target to manipulate. To this end, we propose that the manipulation skills should include mobility to have flexibility in interacting with the target object from multiple locations and at the same time the navigation skill could have multiple end points which lead to successful manipulation. We operationalize these ideas by implementing mobile manipulation skills rather than stationary ones and training a navigation skill trained with region goal instead of point goal. We evaluate our multi-skill mobile manipulation method M3 on 3 challenging long-horizon mobile manipulation tasks in the Home Assistant Benchmark (HAB), and show superior performance as compared to the baselines. 我们研究了一种模块化方法来处理用于对象重新排列的长视野移动操作任务，该方法将完整任务分解为一系列子任务。为了解决整个任务，之前的工作将多种固定操作技能与点目标导航技能联系起来，这些技能是在子任务中单独学习的。尽管比单一的端到端强化学习策略更有效，但该框架在技能链中遇到了复合错误，例如，导航到固定操纵技能无法达到其操纵目标的不良位置。为此，我们建议操纵技能应包括移动性，以便能够灵活地从多个位置与目标对象进行交互，同时导航技能可以具有多个端点，从而实现成功的操纵。我们通过实施移动操纵技能而不是固定操纵技能并训练以区域目标而不是点目标训练的导航技能来实施这些想法。我们在家庭助理基准 (HAB) 中对 3 个具有挑战性的长视野移动操作任务评估了我们的多技能移动操作方法 M3，并显示出与基线相比的卓越性能。 本文提出一种模块化方法，通过结合移动机械臂的导航与操作技能，解决复杂场景下的物体重排任务。 Jiayuan Gu,Devendra Singh Chaplot,Hao Su,Jitendra Malik cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Nawshad Farruque,Randy Goebel,Sudhakar Sivapalan,Osmar Zaiane
title: Depression Symptoms Modelling from Social Media Text: A Semi-supervised Learning Approach
title_zh: 社交媒体文本的抑郁症状建模：半监督学习方法
comment: Title and relevant changes are made
comments: Title and relevant changes are made
abstract: A fundamental component of user-level social media language based clinical depression modelling is depression symptoms detection (DSD). Unfortunately, there does not exist any DSD dataset that reflects both the clinical insights and the distribution of depression symptoms from the samples of self-disclosed depressed population. In our work, we describe a Semi-supervised Learning (SSL) framework which uses an initial supervised learning model that leverages 1) a state-of-the-art large mental health forum text pre-trained language model further fine-tuned on a clinician annotated DSD dataset, 2) a Zero-Shot learning model for DSD, and couples them together to harvest depression symptoms related samples from our large self-curated Depression Tweets Repository (DTR). Our clinician annotated dataset is the largest of its kind. Furthermore, DTR is created from the samples of tweets in self-disclosed depressed users Twitter timeline from two datasets, including one of the largest benchmark datasets for user-level depression detection from Twitter. This further helps preserve the depression symptoms distribution of self-disclosed Twitter users tweets. Subsequently, we iteratively retrain our initial DSD model with the harvested data. We discuss the stopping criteria and limitations of this SSL process, and elaborate the underlying constructs which play a vital role in the overall SSL process. We show that we can produce a final dataset which is the largest of its kind. Furthermore, a DSD and a Depression Post Detection (DPD) model trained on it achieves significantly better accuracy than their initial version.
summary: A fundamental component of user-level social media language based clinical depression modelling is depression symptoms detection (DSD). Unfortunately, there does not exist any DSD dataset that reflects both the clinical insights and the distribution of depression symptoms from the samples of self-disclosed depressed population. In our work, we describe a Semi-supervised Learning (SSL) framework which uses an initial supervised learning model that leverages 1) a state-of-the-art large mental health forum text pre-trained language model further fine-tuned on a clinician annotated DSD dataset, 2) a Zero-Shot learning model for DSD, and couples them together to harvest depression symptoms related samples from our large self-curated Depression Tweets Repository (DTR). Our clinician annotated dataset is the largest of its kind. Furthermore, DTR is created from the samples of tweets in self-disclosed depressed users Twitter timeline from two datasets, including one of the largest benchmark datasets for user-level depression detection from Twitter. This further helps preserve the depression symptoms distribution of self-disclosed Twitter users tweets. Subsequently, we iteratively retrain our initial DSD model with the harvested data. We discuss the stopping criteria and limitations of this SSL process, and elaborate the underlying constructs which play a vital role in the overall SSL process. We show that we can produce a final dataset which is the largest of its kind. Furthermore, a DSD and a Depression Post Detection (DPD) model trained on it achieves significantly better accuracy than their initial version.
abstract_zh: 基于用户级社交媒体语言的临床抑郁症模型的一个基本组成部分是抑郁症症状检测（DSD）。不幸的是，不存在任何 DSD 数据集能够反映自我披露的抑郁人群样本中的临床见解和抑郁症状的分布。在我们的工作中，我们描述了一个半监督学习 (SSL) 框架，该框架使用初始监督学习模型，该模型利用 1) 最先进的大型心理健康论坛文本预训练语言模型，在临床医生注释的 DSD 数据集上进一步微调，2) DSD 的零样本学习模型，并将它们结合在一起，从我们的大型自我管理的抑郁推文存储库 (DTR) 中收获抑郁症状相关的样本。我们的临床医生注释数据集是同类中最大的。此外，DTR 是根据两个数据集的自我披露的抑郁用户 Twitter 时间线中的推文样本创建的，其中包括 Twitter 用户级抑郁症检测的最大基准数据集之一。这进一步有助于保留自我披露的 Twitter 用户推文的抑郁症状分布。随后，我们使用收集到的数据迭代地重新训练我们的初始 DSD 模型。我们讨论了该 SSL 过程的停止标准和限制，并详细阐述了在整个 SSL 过程中起着至关重要作用的底层构造。我们证明我们可以生成同类中最大的最终数据集。此外，在其上训练的 DSD 和抑郁后检测 (DPD) 模型比其初始版本具有明显更好的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督学习框架，用于从社交媒体文本中建模抑郁症状，通过结合预训练语言模型和零样本学习方法，构建大规模抑郁症状检测数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有抑郁症状检测数据集缺乏临床洞察与自我披露抑郁用户症状分布的结合，限制了模型性能提升。
AI.method: 利用预训练语言模型与零样本学习模型生成初始检测模型，结合自建的抑郁推文仓库（DTR）迭代挖掘症状相关样本，并通过半监督学习优化模型。
AI.result: 生成当前最大规模的抑郁症状检测数据集，训练出的模型在抑郁症状检测和抑郁帖子检测任务中准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习框架有效结合临床标注数据与社交媒体文本，为抑郁症状建模提供了更全面的数据支持与性能提升方案。

authors_text: Davide Buffelli,Efthymia Tsamoura
title: Scalable Regularization of Scene Graph Generation Models using Symbolic Theories
title_zh: 使用符号理论的场景图生成模型的可扩展正则化
abstract: Several techniques have recently aimed to improve the performance of deep learning models for Scene Graph Generation (SGG) by incorporating background knowledge. State-of-the-art techniques can be divided into two families: one where the background knowledge is incorporated into the model in a subsymbolic fashion, and another in which the background knowledge is maintained in symbolic form. Despite promising results, both families of techniques face several shortcomings: the first one requires ad-hoc, more complex neural architectures increasing the training or inference cost; the second one suffers from limited scalability w.r.t. the size of the background knowledge. Our work introduces a regularization technique for injecting symbolic background knowledge into neural SGG models that overcomes the limitations of prior art. Our technique is model-agnostic, does not incur any cost at inference time, and scales to previously unmanageable background knowledge sizes. We demonstrate that our technique can improve the accuracy of state-of-the-art SGG models, by up to 33%.
summary: Several techniques have recently aimed to improve the performance of deep learning models for Scene Graph Generation (SGG) by incorporating background knowledge. State-of-the-art techniques can be divided into two families: one where the background knowledge is incorporated into the model in a subsymbolic fashion, and another in which the background knowledge is maintained in symbolic form. Despite promising results, both families of techniques face several shortcomings: the first one requires ad-hoc, more complex neural architectures increasing the training or inference cost; the second one suffers from limited scalability w.r.t. the size of the background knowledge. Our work introduces a regularization technique for injecting symbolic background knowledge into neural SGG models that overcomes the limitations of prior art. Our technique is model-agnostic, does not incur any cost at inference time, and scales to previously unmanageable background knowledge sizes. We demonstrate that our technique can improve the accuracy of state-of-the-art SGG models, by up to 33%.
abstract_zh: 最近有几种技术旨在通过结合背景知识来提高场景图生成（SGG）深度学习模型的性能。最先进的技术可以分为两类：一类是背景知识以亚符号方式合并到模型中，另一类是背景知识以符号形式维护。尽管取得了有希望的结果，但这两个技术系列都面临着几个缺点：第一个技术需要临时的、更复杂的神经架构，增加了训练或推理成本；第二个的可扩展性有限。背景知识的大小。我们的工作引入了一种正则化技术，用于将符号背景知识注入神经 SGG 模型，克服了现有技术的局限性。我们的技术与模型无关，在推理时不会产生任何成本，并且可以扩展到以前无法管理的背景知识规模。我们证明，我们的技术可以将最先进的 SGG 模型的准确性提高高达 33%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于符号理论的可扩展正则化方法，将背景知识注入场景图生成模型以克服现有技术的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有两种注入背景知识的方法分别存在模型复杂度高和可扩展性差的缺陷，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计模型无关的正则化技术，利用符号理论在推理时零成本注入背景知识，支持大规模知识库。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可使最先进模型准确率提升最高33%。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效平衡了模型复杂度与可扩展性，为场景图生成提供了更优的知识注入范式。

search_text: Scalable Regularization of Scene Graph Generation Models using Symbolic Theories 使用符号理论的场景图生成模型的可扩展正则化 Several techniques have recently aimed to improve the performance of deep learning models for Scene Graph Generation (SGG) by incorporating background knowledge. State-of-the-art techniques can be divided into two families: one where the background knowledge is incorporated into the model in a subsymbolic fashion, and another in which the background knowledge is maintained in symbolic form. Despite promising results, both families of techniques face several shortcomings: the first one requires ad-hoc, more complex neural architectures increasing the training or inference cost; the second one suffers from limited scalability w.r.t. the size of the background knowledge. Our work introduces a regularization technique for injecting symbolic background knowledge into neural SGG models that overcomes the limitations of prior art. Our technique is model-agnostic, does not incur any cost at inference time, and scales to previously unmanageable background knowledge sizes. We demonstrate that our technique can improve the accuracy of state-of-the-art SGG models, by up to 33%. 最近有几种技术旨在通过结合背景知识来提高场景图生成（SGG）深度学习模型的性能。最先进的技术可以分为两类：一类是背景知识以亚符号方式合并到模型中，另一类是背景知识以符号形式维护。尽管取得了有希望的结果，但这两个技术系列都面临着几个缺点：第一个技术需要临时的、更复杂的神经架构，增加了训练或推理成本；第二个的可扩展性有限。背景知识的大小。我们的工作引入了一种正则化技术，用于将符号背景知识注入神经 SGG 模型，克服了现有技术的局限性。我们的技术与模型无关，在推理时不会产生任何成本，并且可以扩展到以前无法管理的背景知识规模。我们证明，我们的技术可以将最先进的 SGG 模型的准确性提高高达 33%。 本文提出一种基于符号理论的可扩展正则化方法，将背景知识注入场景图生成模型以克服现有技术的不足。 Davide Buffelli,Efthymia Tsamoura cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Lara Letaw,Rosalinda Garcia,Patricia Morreale,Gail Verdi,Heather Garcia,Geraldine Jimena Noa,Spencer P. Madsen,Maria Jesus Alzugaray-Orellana,Margaret Burnett
title: Educating Educators to Integrate Inclusive Design Across a 4-Year CS Degree Program
title_zh: 教育教育工作者将包容性设计融入四年制计算机科学学位课程
abstract: How can an entire CS faculty, who together have been teaching the ACM standard CS curricula, shift to teaching elements of inclusive design across a 4-year undergraduate CS program? And will they even want to try? To investigate these questions, we developed an educate-the-educators curriculum to support this shift. The overall goal of the educate-the-educators curriculum was to enable CS faculty to creatively engage with embedding inclusive design into their courses in "minimally invasive" ways. GenderMag, an inclusive design evaluation method, was selected for use. The curriculum targeted the following learning outcomes: to enable CS faculty: (1) to analyze the costs and benefits of integrating inclusive design into their own course(s); (2) to evaluate software using the GenderMag method, and recognize its use to identify meaningful issues in software; (3) to integrate inclusive design into existing course materials with provided resources and collaboration; and (4) to prepare to engage and guide students on learning GenderMag concepts. We conducted a field study over a spring/summer followed by end-of-fall interviews, during which we worked with 18 faculty members to integrate inclusive design into 13 courses. Ten of these faculty then taught 7 of these courses that were on the Fall 2021 schedule, across 16 sections. We present the new educate-the-educators curriculum and report on the faculty's experiences acting upon it over the three-month field study and subsequent interviews. Our results showed that, of the 18 faculty we worked with, 83% chose to modify their courses; by Fall 2021, faculty across all four years of a CS degree program had begun teaching inclusive design concepts. When we followed up with the 10 Fall 2021 faculty, 91% of their reported outcomes indicated that the incorporations of inclusive design concepts in their courses went as well as or better than expected.
