search_text: Is it Fun?: Understanding Enjoyment in Non-Game HCI Research 这有趣吗？：理解非游戏人机交互研究中的乐趣 An experience of fun can be an important factor for validating the value of games. Research on non-game HCI has been attempted to measure the enjoyment of work. However, a majority of the studies do not discuss the importance and value of the result. It is not clear as to how the term fun is understood in a non-game context. To analyze this shortcoming, we reviewed extant studies, and explored as to how researchers determine if the value of an activity is fun. Consequently, we discussed and categorized the usage of the terms and analyzed the methodologies that are used in extant studies that evaluate the effects of fun and related terms. To gain a better understanding of fun in HCI, we provided several directions that can be discussed for strengthening enjoyable HCI research beyond applications involving games. 有趣的体验可能是验证游戏价值的重要因素。人们尝试对非游戏人机交互进行研究来衡量工作的乐趣。然而，大多数研究没有讨论结果的重要性和价值。目前尚不清楚在非游戏环境中如何理解“乐趣”一词。为了分析这个缺点，我们回顾了现有的研究，并探讨了研究人员如何确定一项活动的价值是否有趣。因此，我们讨论和分类了术语的使用，并分析了现有研究中评估乐趣和相关术语的影响所使用的方法。为了更好地理解人机交互的乐趣，我们提供了几个可以讨论的方向，以加强涉及游戏的应用程序之外的令人愉快的人机交互研究。 本文分析非游戏领域人机交互（HCI）研究中‘乐趣’概念的定义与评估方法，指出当前研究对‘乐趣’价值理解的不足，并提出改进方向。 Michinari Kono,Koichi Araake cs.HC

authors_text: Alessandro Cimatti,Luca Geatti,Nicola Gigante,Angelo Montanari,Stefano Tonetta
title: A first-order logic characterization of safety and co-safety languages
title_zh: 安全和协同安全语言的一阶逻辑表征
comment: ef:Logical Methods in Computer Science, Volume 19, Issue 3 (August 10, 2023) lmcs:10061
comments: ef:Logical Methods in Computer Science, Volume 19, Issue 3 (August 10, 2023) lmcs:10061
abstract: Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) is one of the most popular temporal logics, that comes into play in a variety of branches of computer science. Among the various reasons of its widespread use there are its strong foundational properties: LTL is equivalent to counter-free omega-automata, to star-free omega-regular expressions, and (by Kamp's theorem) to the First-Order Theory of Linear Orders (FO-TLO). Safety and co-safety languages, where a finite prefix suffices to establish whether a word does not belong or belongs to the language, respectively, play a crucial role in lowering the complexity of problems like model checking and reactive synthesis for LTL. SafetyLTL (resp., coSafetyLTL) is a fragment of LTL where only universal (resp., existential) temporal modalities are allowed, that recognises safety (resp., co-safety) languages only. The main contribution of this paper is the introduction of a fragment of FO-TLO, called SafetyFO, and of its dual coSafetyFO, which are expressively complete with respect to the LTL-definable safety and co-safety languages. We prove that they exactly characterize SafetyLTL and coSafetyLTL, respectively, a result that joins Kamp's theorem, and provides a clearer view of the characterization of (fragments of) LTL in terms of first-order languages. In addition, it gives a direct, compact, and self-contained proof that any safety language definable in LTL is definable in SafetyLTL as well. As a by-product, we obtain some interesting results on the expressive power of the weak tomorrow operator of SafetyLTL, interpreted over finite and infinite words. Moreover, we prove that, when interpreted over finite words, SafetyLTL (resp. coSafetyLTL) devoid of the tomorrow (resp., weak tomorrow) operator captures the safety (resp., co-safety) fragment of LTL over finite words.
summary: Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) is one of the most popular temporal logics, that comes into play in a variety of branches of computer science. Among the various reasons of its widespread use there are its strong foundational properties: LTL is equivalent to counter-free omega-automata, to star-free omega-regular expressions, and (by Kamp's theorem) to the First-Order Theory of Linear Orders (FO-TLO). Safety and co-safety languages, where a finite prefix suffices to establish whether a word does not belong or belongs to the language, respectively, play a crucial role in lowering the complexity of problems like model checking and reactive synthesis for LTL. SafetyLTL (resp., coSafetyLTL) is a fragment of LTL where only universal (resp., existential) temporal modalities are allowed, that recognises safety (resp., co-safety) languages only. The main contribution of this paper is the introduction of a fragment of FO-TLO, called SafetyFO, and of its dual coSafetyFO, which are expressively complete with respect to the LTL-definable safety and co-safety languages. We prove that they exactly characterize SafetyLTL and coSafetyLTL, respectively, a result that joins Kamp's theorem, and provides a clearer view of the characterization of (fragments of) LTL in terms of first-order languages. In addition, it gives a direct, compact, and self-contained proof that any safety language definable in LTL is definable in SafetyLTL as well. As a by-product, we obtain some interesting results on the expressive power of the weak tomorrow operator of SafetyLTL, interpreted over finite and infinite words. Moreover, we prove that, when interpreted over finite words, SafetyLTL (resp. coSafetyLTL) devoid of the tomorrow (resp., weak tomorrow) operator captures the safety (resp., co-safety) fragment of LTL over finite words.
abstract_zh: 线性时序逻辑（LTL）是最流行的时序逻辑之一，在计算机科学的各个分支中发挥着作用。其广泛使用的各种原因包括其强大的基础特性：LTL 相当于无计数器欧米茄自动机、无星欧米茄正则表达式以及（根据坎普定理）线性阶一阶理论 (FO-TLO)。安全语言和共安全语言，其中有限前缀足以分别确定一个单词是否不属于或属于该语言，在降低 LTL 的模型检查和反应合成等问题的复杂性方面发挥着至关重要的作用。 SafetyLTL（分别为 coSafetyLTL）是 LTL 的一个片段，其中仅允许通用（分别为存在）时间模态，并且仅识别安全（分别为共同安全）语言。本文的主要贡献是引入了 FO-TLO 的一个片段（称为 SafetyFO）及其双 coSafetyFO，它们对于 LTL 可定义的安全和协同安全语言来说是表达完整的。我们证明它们分别准确地表征了 SafetyLTL 和 coSafetyLTL，这一结果与坎普定理相结合，并提供了关于一阶语言中 LTL（的片段）表征的更清晰的视图。此外，它还提供了直接、紧凑且独立的证明，证明任何可在 LTL 中定义的安全语言也可在 SafetyLTL 中定义。作为副产品，我们在 SafetyLTL 弱明天运算符的表达能力方面获得了一些有趣的结果，并通过有限和无限单词进行解释。此外，我们证明，当对有限字进行解释时，没有明天（或弱明天）运算符的 SafetyLTL（或 coSafetyLTL）可以捕获有限字上 LTL 的安全（或共同安全）片段。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入一阶逻辑片段SafetyFO和coSafetyFO，对安全语言和共安全语言进行形式化表征，并证明其与LTL片段SafetyLTL和coSafetyLTL的表达等价性。
AI.motivation: 安全语言和共安全语言在模型检测和反应合成中具有重要地位，但现有LTL片段的表征缺乏清晰的一阶逻辑对应关系，需建立更简洁的理论框架以降低复杂性。
AI.method: 提出SafetyFO和coSafetyFO两个一阶逻辑片段，结合Kamp定理证明其与SafetyLTL/coSafetyLTL的表达完备性，并通过直接证明揭示LTL安全语言在SafetyLTL中的可定义性。
AI.result: SafetyFO/coSafetyFO精确表征SafetyLTL/coSafetyLTL，且证明LTL安全语言必可由SafetyLTL定义；同时分析了弱明天算子在有限字上的表达能力差异。
AI.conclusion: 本文将Kamp定理与LTL片段表征相结合，为时序逻辑的分片特性提供了统一的一阶视角，并深化了对有限/无限字上算子表达能力的理解。

authors_text: Zijia Li,Hans-Peter Schröcker,Mikhail Skopenkov,Daniel F. Scharler
title: Motion Polynomials Admitting a Factorization with Linear Factors
title_zh: 允许线性因子分解的运动多项式
abstract: Motion polynomials (polynomials over the dual quaternions with nonzero real norm) describe rational motions. We present a necessary and sufficient condition for reduced bounded motion polynomials to admit factorizations into monic linear factors, and we give an algorithm to compute them. We can use those linear factors to construct mechanisms because the factorization corresponds to the decomposition of the rational motion into simple rotations or translations. Bounded motion polynomials always admit a factorization into linear factors after multiplying with a suitable real or quaternion polynomial. Our criterion for factorizability allows us to improve on earlier algorithms to compute a suitable real or quaternion polynomial co-factor.
summary: Motion polynomials (polynomials over the dual quaternions with nonzero real norm) describe rational motions. We present a necessary and sufficient condition for reduced bounded motion polynomials to admit factorizations into monic linear factors, and we give an algorithm to compute them. We can use those linear factors to construct mechanisms because the factorization corresponds to the decomposition of the rational motion into simple rotations or translations. Bounded motion polynomials always admit a factorization into linear factors after multiplying with a suitable real or quaternion polynomial. Our criterion for factorizability allows us to improve on earlier algorithms to compute a suitable real or quaternion polynomial co-factor.
abstract_zh: 运动多项式（具有非零实范数的对偶四元数多项式）描述有理运动。我们提出了简化有界运动多项式的充分必要条件，以允许因式分解为一元线性因子，并给出了计算它们的算法。我们可以使用这些线性因子来构建机制，因为因式分解对应于将有理运动分解为简单的旋转或平移。有界运动多项式在与合适的实数或四元数多项式相乘后始终允许因式分解为线性因子。我们的因式分解标准使我们能够改进早期算法来计算合适的实数或四元数多项式辅因子。

AI.tldr: 研究运动多项式能否分解为线性因子的条件，并提出相应的计算算法。
AI.motivation: 将有理运动分解为简单旋转或平移有助于机械结构设计，而运动多项式的线性因子分解是实现该目标的关键。
AI.method: 提出约化有界运动多项式可分解为单一线性因子的充要条件，并设计算法计算其分解形式，同时改进现有算法以处理更广泛的多项式。

search_text: Motion Polynomials Admitting a Factorization with Linear Factors 允许线性因子分解的运动多项式 Motion polynomials (polynomials over the dual quaternions with nonzero real norm) describe rational motions. We present a necessary and sufficient condition for reduced bounded motion polynomials to admit factorizations into monic linear factors, and we give an algorithm to compute them. We can use those linear factors to construct mechanisms because the factorization corresponds to the decomposition of the rational motion into simple rotations or translations. Bounded motion polynomials always admit a factorization into linear factors after multiplying with a suitable real or quaternion polynomial. Our criterion for factorizability allows us to improve on earlier algorithms to compute a suitable real or quaternion polynomial co-factor. 运动多项式（具有非零实范数的对偶四元数多项式）描述有理运动。我们提出了简化有界运动多项式的充分必要条件，以允许因式分解为一元线性因子，并给出了计算它们的算法。我们可以使用这些线性因子来构建机制，因为因式分解对应于将有理运动分解为简单的旋转或平移。有界运动多项式在与合适的实数或四元数多项式相乘后始终允许因式分解为线性因子。我们的因式分解标准使我们能够改进早期算法来计算合适的实数或四元数多项式辅因子。 研究运动多项式能否分解为线性因子的条件，并提出相应的计算算法。 Zijia Li,Hans-Peter Schröcker,Mikhail Skopenkov,Daniel F. Scharler math.RA,cs.RO

authors_text: Thanh Tam Nguyen,Thanh Trung Huynh,Zhao Ren,Phi Le Nguyen,Alan Wee-Chung Liew,Hongzhi Yin,Quoc Viet Hung Nguyen
title: A Survey of Machine Unlearning
title_zh: 机器遗忘的调查
comment: extend the survey with more recent published work and add more discussions
comments: extend the survey with more recent published work and add more discussions
abstract: Today, computer systems hold large amounts of personal data. Yet while such an abundance of data allows breakthroughs in artificial intelligence, and especially machine learning (ML), its existence can be a threat to user privacy, and it can weaken the bonds of trust between humans and AI. Recent regulations now require that, on request, private information about a user must be removed from both computer systems and from ML models, i.e. ``the right to be forgotten''). While removing data from back-end databases should be straightforward, it is not sufficient in the AI context as ML models often `remember' the old data. Contemporary adversarial attacks on trained models have proven that we can learn whether an instance or an attribute belonged to the training data. This phenomenon calls for a new paradigm, namely machine unlearning, to make ML models forget about particular data. It turns out that recent works on machine unlearning have not been able to completely solve the problem due to the lack of common frameworks and resources. Therefore, this paper aspires to present a comprehensive examination of machine unlearning's concepts, scenarios, methods, and applications. Specifically, as a category collection of cutting-edge studies, the intention behind this article is to serve as a comprehensive resource for researchers and practitioners seeking an introduction to machine unlearning and its formulations, design criteria, removal requests, algorithms, and applications. In addition, we aim to highlight the key findings, current trends, and new research areas that have not yet featured the use of machine unlearning but could benefit greatly from it. We hope this survey serves as a valuable resource for ML researchers and those seeking to innovate privacy technologies. Our resources are publicly available at https://github.com/tamlhp/awesome-machine-unlearning.
summary: Today, computer systems hold large amounts of personal data. Yet while such an abundance of data allows breakthroughs in artificial intelligence, and especially machine learning (ML), its existence can be a threat to user privacy, and it can weaken the bonds of trust between humans and AI. Recent regulations now require that, on request, private information about a user must be removed from both computer systems and from ML models, i.e. ``the right to be forgotten''). While removing data from back-end databases should be straightforward, it is not sufficient in the AI context as ML models often `remember' the old data. Contemporary adversarial attacks on trained models have proven that we can learn whether an instance or an attribute belonged to the training data. This phenomenon calls for a new paradigm, namely machine unlearning, to make ML models forget about particular data. It turns out that recent works on machine unlearning have not been able to completely solve the problem due to the lack of common frameworks and resources. Therefore, this paper aspires to present a comprehensive examination of machine unlearning's concepts, scenarios, methods, and applications. Specifically, as a category collection of cutting-edge studies, the intention behind this article is to serve as a comprehensive resource for researchers and practitioners seeking an introduction to machine unlearning and its formulations, design criteria, removal requests, algorithms, and applications. In addition, we aim to highlight the key findings, current trends, and new research areas that have not yet featured the use of machine unlearning but could benefit greatly from it. We hope this survey serves as a valuable resource for ML researchers and those seeking to innovate privacy technologies. Our resources are publicly available at https://github.com/tamlhp/awesome-machine-unlearning.
abstract_zh: 如今，计算机系统保存着大量的个人数据。然而，尽管如此丰富的数据使得人工智能，尤其是机器学习 (ML) 取得突破，但它的存在可能对用户隐私构成威胁，并且可能削弱人类与人工智能之间的信任纽带。最近的法规现在要求，根据要求，必须从计算机系统和机器学习模型中删除有关用户的私人信息，即“被遗忘的权利”）。虽然从后端数据库中删除数据应该很简单，但在人工智能环境中这还不够，因为机器学习模型通常会“记住”旧数据。当代对训练模型的对抗性攻击已经证明，我们可以了解实例或属性是否属于训练数据。这种现象需要一种新的范式，即机器遗忘，让机器学习模型忘记特定的数据。事实证明，由于缺乏通用框架和资源，最近关于机器取消学习的工作未能完全解决该问题。因此，本文旨在对机器去学习的概念、场景、方法和应用进行全面的审视。具体来说，作为前沿研究的类别集合，本文背后的目的是为寻求介绍机器取消学习及其公式、设计标准、删除请求、算法和应用的研究人员和从业者提供综合资源。此外，我们的目标是强调尚未使用机器学习但可以从中受益匪浅的主要发现、当前趋势和新研究领域。我们希望这项调查能够为机器学习研究人员和寻求创新隐私技术的人们提供宝贵的资源。我们的资源可在 https://github.com/tamlhp/awesome-machine-unlearning 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在全面回顾机器遗忘（Machine Unlearning）的概念、场景、方法及应用，为研究人员和从业者提供系统性参考。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统存储大量用户数据，隐私保护需求迫切。传统数据删除方法无法彻底移除数据对模型的影响，需通过机器遗忘技术实现模型层面的数据遗忘。
AI.method: 通过收集和分类最新研究，系统梳理机器遗忘的理论框架、设计标准、算法实现及应用场景，并分析当前研究趋势与未被充分探索的领域。
AI.result: 总结了机器遗忘的核心方法与挑战，提出了未来研究方向，并公开了相关资源库（GitHub项目）以促进技术发展。
AI.conclusion: 机器遗忘是保障AI隐私的关键技术，本文为后续研究提供了全面综述与实践指导，推动隐私保护技术的创新。

authors_text: Manan Choksi,Dipankar Chaki,Abdallah Lakhdari,Athman Bouguettaya
title: You Are What You Use: Usage-based Profiling in IoT Environments
title_zh: 你就是你所使用的：物联网环境中基于使用情况的分析
abstract: Habit extraction is essential to automate services and provide appliance usage insights in the smart home environment. However, habit extraction comes with plenty of challenges in viewing typical start and end times for particular activities. This paper introduces a novel way of identifying habits using an ensemble of unsupervised clustering techniques. We use different clustering algorithms to extract habits based on how static or dynamic they are. Silhouette coefficients and a novel noise metric are utilized to extract habits appropriately. Furthermore, we associate the extracted habits with time intervals and a confidence score to denote how confident we are that a habit is likely to occur at that time.
summary: Habit extraction is essential to automate services and provide appliance usage insights in the smart home environment. However, habit extraction comes with plenty of challenges in viewing typical start and end times for particular activities. This paper introduces a novel way of identifying habits using an ensemble of unsupervised clustering techniques. We use different clustering algorithms to extract habits based on how static or dynamic they are. Silhouette coefficients and a novel noise metric are utilized to extract habits appropriately. Furthermore, we associate the extracted habits with time intervals and a confidence score to denote how confident we are that a habit is likely to occur at that time.
abstract_zh: 习惯提取对于自动化服务和提供智能家居环境中设备使用情况的洞察至关重要。然而，习惯提取在查看特定活动的典型开始和结束时间方面面临着许多挑战。本文介绍了一种使用无监督聚类技术集合来识别习惯的新方法。我们使用不同的聚类算法根据习惯的静态或动态程度来提取习惯。利用轮廓系数和新颖的噪声度量来适当地提取习惯。此外，我们将提取的习惯与时间间隔和置信度分数相关联，以表示我们对当时可能发生某个习惯的信心有多大。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无监督聚类技术的物联网环境中用户习惯识别方法，并通过时间间隔和置信度进行关联。
AI.motivation: 在智能家居环境中，习惯提取对于自动化服务和洞察设备使用情况至关重要，但如何准确识别具有动态或静态特性的活动时间仍面临挑战。
AI.method: 采用集成的无监督聚类算法，结合轮廓系数和噪声度量，根据习惯的静态或动态特性提取用户习惯，并关联时间间隔与置信度评分。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效识别用户习惯，提高智能设备使用预测的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为物联网环境中的用户习惯识别提供了有效解决方案，有助于提升智能家居服务的自动化水平。

conclusion: 该方法为物联网环境中的用户习惯识别提供了有效解决方案，有助于提升智能家居服务的自动化水平。
search_text: You Are What You Use: Usage-based Profiling in IoT Environments 你就是你所使用的：物联网环境中基于使用情况的分析 Habit extraction is essential to automate services and provide appliance usage insights in the smart home environment. However, habit extraction comes with plenty of challenges in viewing typical start and end times for particular activities. This paper introduces a novel way of identifying habits using an ensemble of unsupervised clustering techniques. We use different clustering algorithms to extract habits based on how static or dynamic they are. Silhouette coefficients and a novel noise metric are utilized to extract habits appropriately. Furthermore, we associate the extracted habits with time intervals and a confidence score to denote how confident we are that a habit is likely to occur at that time. 习惯提取对于自动化服务和提供智能家居环境中设备使用情况的洞察至关重要。然而，习惯提取在查看特定活动的典型开始和结束时间方面面临着许多挑战。本文介绍了一种使用无监督聚类技术集合来识别习惯的新方法。我们使用不同的聚类算法根据习惯的静态或动态程度来提取习惯。利用轮廓系数和新颖的噪声度量来适当地提取习惯。此外，我们将提取的习惯与时间间隔和置信度分数相关联，以表示我们对当时可能发生某个习惯的信心有多大。 本文提出了一种基于无监督聚类技术的物联网环境中用户习惯识别方法，并通过时间间隔和置信度进行关联。 Manan Choksi,Dipankar Chaki,Abdallah Lakhdari,Athman Bouguettaya cs.HC

authors_text: Yanchao Xu,Wenbo Shao,Jun Li,Kai Yang,Weida Wang,Hua Huang,Chen Lv,Hong Wang
title: SIND: A Drone Dataset at Signalized Intersection in China
title_zh: SIND：中国信号交叉口的无人机数据集
abstract: Intersection is one of the most challenging scenarios for autonomous driving tasks. Due to the complexity and stochasticity, essential applications (e.g., behavior modeling, motion prediction, safety validation, etc.) at intersections rely heavily on data-driven techniques. Thus, there is an intense demand for trajectory datasets of traffic participants (TPs) in intersections. Currently, most intersections in urban areas are equipped with traffic lights. However, there is not yet a large-scale, high-quality, publicly available trajectory dataset for signalized intersections. Therefore, in this paper, a typical two-phase signalized intersection is selected in Tianjin, China. Besides, a pipeline is designed to construct a Signalized INtersection Dataset (SIND), which contains 7 hours of recording including over 13,000 TPs with 7 types. Then, the behaviors of traffic light violations in SIND are recorded. Furthermore, the SIND is also compared with other similar works. The features of the SIND can be summarized as follows: 1) SIND provides more comprehensive information, including traffic light states, motion parameters, High Definition (HD) map, etc. 2) The category of TPs is diverse and characteristic, where the proportion of vulnerable road users (VRUs) is up to 62.6% 3) Multiple traffic light violations of non-motor vehicles are shown. We believe that SIND would be an effective supplement to existing datasets and can promote related research on autonomous driving.The dataset is available online via: https://github.com/SOTIF-AVLab/SinD

The features of the SIND can be summarized as follows: 1) SIND provides more comprehensive information, including traffic light states, motion parameters, High Definition (HD) map, etc. 2) The category of TPs is diverse and characteristic, where the proportion of vulnerable road users (VRUs) is up to 62.6% 3) Multiple traffic light violations of non-motor vehicles are shown. We believe that SIND would be an effective supplement to existing datasets and can promote related research on autonomous driving.The dataset is available online via: https://github.com/SOTIF-AVLab/SinD
abstract_zh: 十字路口是自动驾驶任务最具挑战性的场景之一。由于复杂性和随机性，交叉口的基本应用（例如行为建模、运动预测、安全验证等）严重依赖数据驱动技术。因此，对十字路口交通参与者（TP）的轨迹数据集有强烈的需求。目前，城市大部分路口都设有红绿灯。然而，目前还没有大规模、高质量、公开的信号交叉口轨迹数据集。因此，本文选择了中国天津市一个典型的两相信号交叉口。此外，还设计了一个管道来构建信号化交叉数据集（SIND），该数据集包含 7 小时的记录，包括 7 种类型的 13,000 多个 TP。然后，记录SIND的交通信号灯违规行为。此外，SIND 还与其他类似作品进行了比较。 SIND的特点可概括为：1）SIND提供更全面的信息，包括红绿灯状态、运动参数、高清地图等。2）TP类别多样且有特色，其中弱势道路使用者（VRU）比例高达62.6%。3）显示多起非机动车交通灯违规行为。我们相信SIND将是对现有数据集的有效补充，并能促进自动驾驶的相关研究。该数据集可在线获取：https://github.com/SOTIF-AVLab/SinD

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SIND的信号交叉口无人机数据集，用于支持自动驾驶相关研究。
AI.motivation: 信号交叉口是自动驾驶任务中最具挑战的场景之一，但目前缺乏大规模、高质量的公开轨迹数据集，限制了数据驱动技术的应用。
AI.method: 在天津选取典型两相位信号交叉口，构建包含7小时记录（超13,000个交通参与者）的SIND数据集，涵盖交通灯状态、高精度地图等信息，并记录非机动车闯红灯等违规行为。
AI.result: SIND数据集包含62.6%的弱势道路使用者（VRUs），涵盖7类交通参与者，提供多维度交通灯违规案例，相较现有数据集更具全面性。
AI.conclusion: SIND可作为现有数据集的有效补充，推动自动驾驶领域行为建模、安全验证等研究进展。

authors_text: Yue Liu,Zhangkai Ni,Shiqi Wang,Hanli Wang,Sam Kwong
title: High Dynamic Range Image Quality Assessment Based on Frequency Disparity
title_zh: 基于频率差的高动态范围图像质量评估
abstract: In this paper, a novel and effective image quality assessment (IQA) algorithm based on frequency disparity for high dynamic range (HDR) images is proposed, termed as local-global frequency feature-based model (LGFM). Motivated by the assumption that the human visual system is highly adapted for extracting structural information and partial frequencies when perceiving the visual scene, the Gabor and the Butterworth filters are applied to the luminance of the HDR image to extract local and global frequency features, respectively. The similarity measurement and feature pooling are sequentially performed on the frequency features to obtain the predicted quality score. The experiments evaluated on four widely used benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed LGFM can provide a higher consistency with the subjective perception compared with the state-of-the-art HDR IQA methods. Our code is available at: \url{https://github.com/eezkni/LGFM}.
summary: In this paper, a novel and effective image quality assessment (IQA) algorithm based on frequency disparity for high dynamic range (HDR) images is proposed, termed as local-global frequency feature-based model (LGFM). Motivated by the assumption that the human visual system is highly adapted for extracting structural information and partial frequencies when perceiving the visual scene, the Gabor and the Butterworth filters are applied to the luminance of the HDR image to extract local and global frequency features, respectively. The similarity measurement and feature pooling are sequentially performed on the frequency features to obtain the predicted quality score. The experiments evaluated on four widely used benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed LGFM can provide a higher consistency with the subjective perception compared with the state-of-the-art HDR IQA methods. Our code is available at: \url{https://github.com/eezkni/LGFM}.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于高动态范围（HDR）图像频率差异的新颖有效的图像质量评估（IQA）算法，称为基于局部-全局频率特征的模型（LGFM）。受人类视觉系统在感知视觉场景时高度适应提取结构信息和部分频率的假设的启发，Gabor 和 Butterworth 滤波器被应用于 HDR 图像的亮度，以分别提取局部和全局频率特征。对频率特征依次进行相似度测量和特征池化以获得预测的质量得分。在四个广泛使用的基准上评估的实验表明，与最先进的 HDR IQA 方法相比，所提出的 LGFM 可以提供与主观感知更高的一致性。我们的代码位于：\url{https://github.com/eezkni/LGFM}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频率差异的高动态范围（HDR）图像质量评估算法LGFM，通过提取局部和全局频率特征来预测图像质量分数。
AI.motivation: 受人类视觉系统擅长提取结构信息和部分频率的启发，旨在设计更符合主观感知的HDR图像质量评估方法。
AI.method: 使用Gabor滤波器提取HDR图像亮度的局部频率特征，Butterworth滤波器提取全局频率特征，通过相似性测量和特征池化生成质量预测分数。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集的实验表明，LGFM相比现有HDR图像质量评估方法能提供更符合主观感知的一致性结果。
AI.conclusion: LGFM方法通过融合局部-全局频率特征有效提升了HDR图像质量评估性能，验证了频率差异分析在质量评估中的有效性。

authors_text: Letian Yu,Haiyang Mei,Wen Dong,Ziqi Wei,Li Zhu,Yuxin Wang,Xin Yang
title: Progressive Glass Segmentation
title_zh: 渐进式玻璃分割
abstract: Glass is very common in the real world. Influenced by the uncertainty about the glass region and the varying complex scenes behind the glass, the existence of glass poses severe challenges to many computer vision tasks, making glass segmentation as an important computer vision task. Glass does not have its own visual appearances but only transmit/reflect the appearances of its surroundings, making it fundamentally different from other common objects. To address such a challenging task, existing methods typically explore and combine useful cues from different levels of features in the deep network. As there exists a characteristic gap between level-different features, i.e., deep layer features embed more high-level semantics and are better at locating the target objects while shallow layer features have larger spatial sizes and keep richer and more detailed low-level information, fusing these features naively thus would lead to a sub-optimal solution. In this paper, we approach the effective features fusion towards accurate glass segmentation in two steps. First, we attempt to bridge the characteristic gap between different levels of features by developing a Discriminability Enhancement (DE) module which enables level-specific features to be a more discriminative representation, alleviating the features incompatibility for fusion. Second, we design a Focus-and-Exploration Based Fusion (FEBF) module to richly excavate useful information in the fusion process by highlighting the common and exploring the difference between level-different features.
summary: Glass is very common in the real world. Influenced by the uncertainty about the glass region and the varying complex scenes behind the glass, the existence of glass poses severe challenges to many computer vision tasks, making glass segmentation as an important computer vision task. Glass does not have its own visual appearances but only transmit/reflect the appearances of its surroundings, making it fundamentally different from other common objects. To address such a challenging task, existing methods typically explore and combine useful cues from different levels of features in the deep network. As there exists a characteristic gap between level-different features, i.e., deep layer features embed more high-level semantics and are better at locating the target objects while shallow layer features have larger spatial sizes and keep richer and more detailed low-level information, fusing these features naively thus would lead to a sub-optimal solution. In this paper, we approach the effective features fusion towards accurate glass segmentation in two steps. First, we attempt to bridge the characteristic gap between different levels of features by developing a Discriminability Enhancement (DE) module which enables level-specific features to be a more discriminative representation, alleviating the features incompatibility for fusion. Second, we design a Focus-and-Exploration Based Fusion (FEBF) module to richly excavate useful information in the fusion process by highlighting the common and exploring the difference between level-different features.
abstract_zh: 玻璃在现实世界中很常见。受玻璃区域的不确定性以及玻璃背后复杂场景变化的影响，玻璃的存在给许多计算机视觉任务带来了严峻的挑战，使得玻璃分割成为一项重要的计算机视觉任务。玻璃没有自己的视觉外观，只是透射/反射周围环境的外观，这使得它与其他常见物体有根本的不同。为了解决这样一项具有挑战性的任务，现有的方法通常会探索并结合来自深度网络中不同级别特征的有用线索。由于不同层次的特征之间存在特征差距，即深层特征嵌入了更多高层语义，更擅长定位目标对象，而浅层特征具有更大的空间尺寸，保留更丰富、更详细的低层信息，因此天真地融合这些特征将导致次优解决方案。在本文中，我们分两步实现有效的特征融合以实现准确的玻璃分割。首先，我们尝试通过开发可辨别性增强（DE）模块来弥合不同级别特征之间的特征差距，该模块使特定级别的特征能够成为更具辨别力的表示，从而减轻特征融合的不兼容性。其次，我们设计了一个基于聚焦和探索的融合（FEBF）模块，通过突出不同级别特征之间的共性并探索差异，在融合过程中丰富地挖掘有用信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种渐进式玻璃分割方法，通过增强特征判别力和设计融合模块解决玻璃区域分割难题。
AI.motivation: 玻璃因缺乏自身视觉特征且受复杂背景干扰，导致传统分割方法难以准确识别。现有特征融合方法因层次特征差异大而效果不佳。
AI.method: 分两步优化特征融合：1）开发判别力增强模块（DE）缩小不同层次特征的差异；2）设计聚焦-探索融合模块（FEBF）挖掘层次特征的共性与差异。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个数据集上显著提升玻璃分割精度，优于现有主流算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过渐进式特征优化与创新融合策略，有效解决了玻璃分割中的特征不兼容问题，为透明物体分割提供新思路。

search_text: Progressive Glass Segmentation 渐进式玻璃分割 Glass is very common in the real world. Influenced by the uncertainty about the glass region and the varying complex scenes behind the glass, the existence of glass poses severe challenges to many computer vision tasks, making glass segmentation as an important computer vision task. Glass does not have its own visual appearances but only transmit/reflect the appearances of its surroundings, making it fundamentally different from other common objects. To address such a challenging task, existing methods typically explore and combine useful cues from different levels of features in the deep network. As there exists a characteristic gap between level-different features, i.e., deep layer features embed more high-level semantics and are better at locating the target objects while shallow layer features have larger spatial sizes and keep richer and more detailed low-level information, fusing these features naively thus would lead to a sub-optimal solution. In this paper, we approach the effective features fusion towards accurate glass segmentation in two steps. First, we attempt to bridge the characteristic gap between different levels of features by developing a Discriminability Enhancement (DE) module which enables level-specific features to be a more discriminative representation, alleviating the features incompatibility for fusion. Second, we design a Focus-and-Exploration Based Fusion (FEBF) module to richly excavate useful information in the fusion process by highlighting the common and exploring the difference between level-different features. 玻璃在现实世界中很常见。受玻璃区域的不确定性以及玻璃背后复杂场景变化的影响，玻璃的存在给许多计算机视觉任务带来了严峻的挑战，使得玻璃分割成为一项重要的计算机视觉任务。玻璃没有自己的视觉外观，只是透射/反射周围环境的外观，这使得它与其他常见物体有根本的不同。为了解决这样一项具有挑战性的任务，现有的方法通常会探索并结合来自深度网络中不同级别特征的有用线索。由于不同层次的特征之间存在特征差距，即深层特征嵌入了更多高层语义，更擅长定位目标对象，而浅层特征具有更大的空间尺寸，保留更丰富、更详细的低层信息，因此天真地融合这些特征将导致次优解决方案。在本文中，我们分两步实现有效的特征融合以实现准确的玻璃分割。首先，我们尝试通过开发可辨别性增强（DE）模块来弥合不同级别特征之间的特征差距，该模块使特定级别的特征能够成为更具辨别力的表示，从而减轻特征融合的不兼容性。其次，我们设计了一个基于聚焦和探索的融合（FEBF）模块，通过突出不同级别特征之间的共性并探索差异，在融合过程中丰富地挖掘有用信息。 本文提出一种渐进式玻璃分割方法，通过增强特征判别力和设计融合模块解决玻璃区域分割难题。 Letian Yu,Haiyang Mei,Wen Dong,Ziqi Wei,Li Zhu,Yuxin Wang,Xin Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Alberto García-Pérez,María José Gómez-Silva,Arturo de la Escalera
title: Automated Defect Recognition of Castings defects using Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用神经网络自动识别铸件缺陷
comment: This preprint has not undergone peer review (when applicable) or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in Journal of Nondestructive Evaluation, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s10921-021-00842-1
comments: This preprint has not undergone peer review (when applicable) or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in Journal of Nondestructive Evaluation, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s10921-021-00842-1
abstract: Industrial X-ray analysis is common in aerospace, automotive or nuclear industries where structural integrity of some parts needs to be guaranteed. However, the interpretation of radiographic images is sometimes difficult and may lead to two experts disagree on defect classification. The Automated Defect Recognition (ADR) system presented herein will reduce the analysis time and will also help reducing the subjective interpretation of the defects while increasing the reliability of the human inspector. Our Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model achieves 94.2\% accuracy (mAP@IoU=50\%), which is considered as similar to expected human performance, when applied to an automotive aluminium castings dataset (GDXray), exceeding current state of the art for this dataset. On an industrial environment, its inference time is less than 400 ms per DICOM image, so it can be installed on production facilities with no impact on delivery time. In addition, an ablation study of the main hyper-parameters to optimise model accuracy from the initial baseline result of 75\% mAP up to 94.2\% mAP, was also conducted.
summary: Industrial X-ray analysis is common in aerospace, automotive or nuclear industries where structural integrity of some parts needs to be guaranteed. However, the interpretation of radiographic images is sometimes difficult and may lead to two experts disagree on defect classification. The Automated Defect Recognition (ADR) system presented herein will reduce the analysis time and will also help reducing the subjective interpretation of the defects while increasing the reliability of the human inspector. Our Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model achieves 94.2\% accuracy (mAP@IoU=50\%), which is considered as similar to expected human performance, when applied to an automotive aluminium castings dataset (GDXray), exceeding current state of the art for this dataset. On an industrial environment, its inference time is less than 400 ms per DICOM image, so it can be installed on production facilities with no impact on delivery time. In addition, an ablation study of the main hyper-parameters to optimise model accuracy from the initial baseline result of 75\% mAP up to 94.2\% mAP, was also conducted.
abstract_zh: 工业 X 射线分析在航空航天、汽车或核工业中很常见，这些行业需要保证某些零件的结构完整性。然而，放射线图像的解释有时很困难，可能导致两位专家在缺陷分类上出现分歧。本文提出的自动缺陷识别（ADR）系统将减少分析时间，还有助于减少对缺陷的主观解释，同时提高人工检查员的可靠性。当应用于汽车铝铸件数据集 (GDXray) 时，我们的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型实现了 94.2% 的准确率 (mAP@IoU=50\%)，这被认为与预期的人类表现相似，超过了该数据集的当前技术水平。在工业环境中，每个 DICOM 图像的推理时间小于 400 毫秒，因此可以安装在生产设施上，而不影响交付时间。此外，还对主要超参数进行了消融研究，以优化模型精度，从 75% mAP 的初始基线结果提高到 94.2% mAP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的自动缺陷识别系统，用于工业铸件X射线图像中的缺陷检测，目标是提升检测效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 工业X射线分析中人工解读存在主观性且耗时，专家间可能对缺陷分类存在分歧，需开发自动化系统以减少人为误差并提升检测可靠性。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络模型，并通过消融实验优化超参数，最终在GDXray数据集上实现高精度检测。
AI.result: 模型在GDXray数据集上达到94.2%的准确率（mAP@IoU=50%），接近人类水平，单张DICOM图像推理时间低于400ms，且通过超参数调优将mAP从75%提升至94.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该CNN模型在铸件缺陷检测中表现优异，兼具高准确率与工业级推理速度，验证了自动化系统在减少人为误差和提升检测效率方面的有效性。

authors_text: Pengfei Deng,Jianhua Yuan,Yanyan Zhao,Bing Qin
title: Zero-shot Aspect-level Sentiment Classification via Explicit Utilization of Aspect-to-Document Sentiment Composition
title_zh: 通过显式利用方面到文档的情感组合进行零样本方面级情感分类
abstract: As aspect-level sentiment labels are expensive and labor-intensive to acquire, zero-shot aspect-level sentiment classification is proposed to learn classifiers applicable to new domains without using any annotated aspect-level data. In contrast, document-level sentiment data with ratings are more easily accessible. In this work, we achieve zero-shot aspect-level sentiment classification by only using document-level reviews. Our key intuition is that the sentiment representation of a document is composed of the sentiment representations of all the aspects of that document. Based on this, we propose the AF-DSC method to explicitly model such sentiment composition in reviews. AF-DSC first learns sentiment representations for all potential aspects and then aggregates aspect-level sentiments into a document-level one to perform document-level sentiment classification. In this way, we obtain the aspect-level sentiment classifier as the by-product of the document-level sentiment classifier. Experimental results on aspect-level sentiment classification benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of explicit utilization of sentiment composition in document-level sentiment classification. Our model with only 30k training data outperforms previous work utilizing millions of data.
summary: As aspect-level sentiment labels are expensive and labor-intensive to acquire, zero-shot aspect-level sentiment classification is proposed to learn classifiers applicable to new domains without using any annotated aspect-level data. In contrast, document-level sentiment data with ratings are more easily accessible. In this work, we achieve zero-shot aspect-level sentiment classification by only using document-level reviews. Our key intuition is that the sentiment representation of a document is composed of the sentiment representations of all the aspects of that document. Based on this, we propose the AF-DSC method to explicitly model such sentiment composition in reviews. AF-DSC first learns sentiment representations for all potential aspects and then aggregates aspect-level sentiments into a document-level one to perform document-level sentiment classification. In this way, we obtain the aspect-level sentiment classifier as the by-product of the document-level sentiment classifier. Experimental results on aspect-level sentiment classification benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of explicit utilization of sentiment composition in document-level sentiment classification. Our model with only 30k training data outperforms previous work utilizing millions of data.
abstract_zh: 由于方面级情感标签的获取成本高昂且劳动密集型，因此提出了零样本方面级情感分类来学习适用于新领域的分类器，而无需使用任何带注释的方面级数据。相比之下，带有评级的文档级情感数据更容易访问。在这项工作中，我们仅通过使用文档级评论来实现零样本方面级情感分类。我们的主要直觉是文档的情感表示由该文档所有方面的情感表示组成。基于此，我们提出了 AF-DSC 方法来对评论中的此类情感成分进行显式建模。 AF-DSC 首先学习所有潜在方面的情感表示，然后将方面级情感聚合为文档级情感以执行文档级情感分类。通过这种方式，我们获得了方面级情感分类器作为文档级情感分类器的副产品。方面级情感分类基准的实验结果证明了在文档级情感分类中显式利用情感组合的有效性。我们的模型仅使用 30k 训练数据，其性能优于之前使用数百万数据的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种零样本方面级情感分类方法AF-DSC，通过显式建模方面到文档的情感组合，仅使用文档级数据实现方面级情感分类。
AI.motivation: 方面级情感标注数据获取成本高，而文档级情感数据更易获得，需探索利用文档级数据实现零样本方面级分类的新方法。
AI.method: AF-DSC方法首先学习所有潜在方面的感情表示，再通过聚合方面级情感生成文档级表示进行分类，使方面级分类器成为文档分类的副产品。
AI.result: 在基准测试中，仅使用3万训练数据的AF-DSC模型效果优于此前使用数百万数据的现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模文档级情感组合能有效提升零样本方面级分类性能，少量高质量文档数据即可达到优于大规模数据的方法效果。

search_text: Zero-shot Aspect-level Sentiment Classification via Explicit Utilization of Aspect-to-Document Sentiment Composition 通过显式利用方面到文档的情感组合进行零样本方面级情感分类 As aspect-level sentiment labels are expensive and labor-intensive to acquire, zero-shot aspect-level sentiment classification is proposed to learn classifiers applicable to new domains without using any annotated aspect-level data. In contrast, document-level sentiment data with ratings are more easily accessible. In this work, we achieve zero-shot aspect-level sentiment classification by only using document-level reviews. Our key intuition is that the sentiment representation of a document is composed of the sentiment representations of all the aspects of that document. Based on this, we propose the AF-DSC method to explicitly model such sentiment composition in reviews. AF-DSC first learns sentiment representations for all potential aspects and then aggregates aspect-level sentiments into a document-level one to perform document-level sentiment classification. In this way, we obtain the aspect-level sentiment classifier as the by-product of the document-level sentiment classifier. Experimental results on aspect-level sentiment classification benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of explicit utilization of sentiment composition in document-level sentiment classification. Our model with only 30k training data outperforms previous work utilizing millions of data. 由于方面级情感标签的获取成本高昂且劳动密集型，因此提出了零样本方面级情感分类来学习适用于新领域的分类器，而无需使用任何带注释的方面级数据。相比之下，带有评级的文档级情感数据更容易访问。在这项工作中，我们仅通过使用文档级评论来实现零样本方面级情感分类。我们的主要直觉是文档的情感表示由该文档所有方面的情感表示组成。基于此，我们提出了 AF-DSC 方法来对评论中的此类情感成分进行显式建模。 AF-DSC 首先学习所有潜在方面的情感表示，然后将方面级情感聚合为文档级情感以执行文档级情感分类。通过这种方式，我们获得了方面级情感分类器作为文档级情感分类器的副产品。方面级情感分类基准的实验结果证明了在文档级情感分类中显式利用情感组合的有效性。我们的模型仅使用 30k 训练数据，其性能优于之前使用数百万数据的工作。 本文提出一种零样本方面级情感分类方法AF-DSC，通过显式建模方面到文档的情感组合，仅使用文档级数据实现方面级情感分类。 Pengfei Deng,Jianhua Yuan,Yanyan Zhao,Bing Qin cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Dibakar Das,Vikram Seshasai,Vineet Sudhir Bhat,Pushkal Juneja,Jyotsna Bapat,Debabrata Das
title: Multi-class Classifier based Failure Prediction with Artificial and Anonymous Training for Data Privacy
title_zh: 基于多类分类器的故障预测以及数据隐私的人工和匿名训练
abstract: This paper proposes a novel non-intrusive system failure prediction technique using available information from developers and minimal information from raw logs (rather than mining entire logs) but keeping the data entirely private with the data owners. A neural network based multi-class classifier is developed for failure prediction, using artificially generated anonymous data set, applying a combination of techniques, viz., genetic algorithm (steps), pattern repetition, etc., to train and test the network. The proposed mechanism completely decouples the data set used for training process from the actual data which is kept private. Moreover, multi-criteria decision making (MCDM) schemes are used to prioritize failures meeting business requirements. Results show high accuracy in failure prediction under different parameter configurations. On a broader context, any classification problem, beyond failure prediction, can be performed using the proposed mechanism with artificially generated data set without looking into the actual data as long as the input features can be translated to binary values (e.g. output from private binary classifiers) and can provide classification-as-a-service.
summary: This paper proposes a novel non-intrusive system failure prediction technique using available information from developers and minimal information from raw logs (rather than mining entire logs) but keeping the data entirely private with the data owners. A neural network based multi-class classifier is developed for failure prediction, using artificially generated anonymous data set, applying a combination of techniques, viz., genetic algorithm (steps), pattern repetition, etc., to train and test the network. The proposed mechanism completely decouples the data set used for training process from the actual data which is kept private. Moreover, multi-criteria decision making (MCDM) schemes are used to prioritize failures meeting business requirements. Results show high accuracy in failure prediction under different parameter configurations. On a broader context, any classification problem, beyond failure prediction, can be performed using the proposed mechanism with artificially generated data set without looking into the actual data as long as the input features can be translated to binary values (e.g. output from private binary classifiers) and can provide classification-as-a-service.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的非侵入式系统故障预测技术，该技术使用开发人员提供的可用信息和原始日志中的最少信息（而不是挖掘整个日志），但对数据所有者保持数据完全私密。开发了一种基于神经网络的多类分类器用于故障预测，使用人工生成的匿名数据集，应用遗传算法（步骤）、模式重复等技术组合来训练和测试网络。所提出的机制将用于训练过程的数据集与保密的实际数据完全解耦。此外，多标准决策（MCDM）方案用于确定满足业务需求的故障的优先级。结果表明，不同参数配置下的故障预测具有较高的准确性。在更广泛的背景下，只要输入特征可以转换为二进制值（例如，私有二元分类器的输出）并且可以提供分类即服务，则除了故障预测之外，任何分类问题都可以使用所提出的机制与人工生成的数据集来执行，而无需查看实际数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人工生成匿名数据集的多类分类器系统故障预测方法，确保数据隐私。
AI.motivation: 现有故障预测方法需访问原始日志数据，存在隐私泄露风险，且难以满足企业对数据安全的严格要求。
AI.method: 采用神经网络构建多类分类器，结合遗传算法、模式重复等技术生成匿名训练数据，通过多准则决策方案（MCDM）优先处理符合业务需求的故障类型。
AI.result: 在不同参数配置下实现高精度故障预测，且该机制可扩展至其他二值化输入特征的分类任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保障数据隐私的前提下有效提升故障预测性能，为隐私敏感场景下的分类问题提供通用解决方案。

authors_text: F. Serhan Daniş,A. Teoman Naskali,A. Taylan Cemgil,Cem Ersoy
title: An Indoor Localization Dataset and Data Collection Framework with High Precision Position Annotation
title_zh: 一种高精度位置标注的室内定位数据集和数据采集框架
abstract: We introduce a novel technique and an associated high resolution dataset that aims to precisely evaluate wireless signal based indoor positioning algorithms. The technique implements an augmented reality (AR) based positioning system that is used to annotate the wireless signal parameter data samples with high precision position data. We track the position of a practical and low cost navigable setup of cameras and a Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) beacon in an area decorated with AR markers. We maximize the performance of the AR-based localization by using a redundant number of markers. Video streams captured by the cameras are subjected to a series of marker recognition, subset selection and filtering operations to yield highly precise pose estimations. Our results show that we can reduce the positional error of the AR localization system to a rate under 0.05 meters. The position data are then used to annotate the BLE data that are captured simultaneously by the sensors stationed in the environment, hence, constructing a wireless signal data set with the ground truth, which allows a wireless signal based localization system to be evaluated accurately.
summary: We introduce a novel technique and an associated high resolution dataset that aims to precisely evaluate wireless signal based indoor positioning algorithms. The technique implements an augmented reality (AR) based positioning system that is used to annotate the wireless signal parameter data samples with high precision position data. We track the position of a practical and low cost navigable setup of cameras and a Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) beacon in an area decorated with AR markers. We maximize the performance of the AR-based localization by using a redundant number of markers. Video streams captured by the cameras are subjected to a series of marker recognition, subset selection and filtering operations to yield highly precise pose estimations. Our results show that we can reduce the positional error of the AR localization system to a rate under 0.05 meters. The position data are then used to annotate the BLE data that are captured simultaneously by the sensors stationed in the environment, hence, constructing a wireless signal data set with the ground truth, which allows a wireless signal based localization system to be evaluated accurately.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了一种新技术和相关的高分辨率数据集，旨在精确评估基于无线信号的室内定位算法。该技术实现了基于增强现实 (AR) 的定位系统，用于用高精度位置数据注释无线信号参数数据样本。我们在装饰有 AR 标记的区域中跟踪实用且低成本的可导航摄像头和低功耗蓝牙 (BLE) 信标的位置。我们通过使用冗余数量的标记来最大化基于 AR 的定位的性能。摄像机捕获的视频流经过一系列标记识别、子集选择和过滤操作，以产生高精度的姿态估计。我们的结果表明，我们可以将 AR 定位系统的位置误差降低到 0.05 米以下。然后，位置数据用于注释由环境中的传感器同时捕获的 BLE 数据，从而构建具有地面实况的无线信号数据集，从而可以准确评估基于无线信号的定位系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于增强现实（AR）的高精度室内定位数据集和数据采集框架，用于精确评估无线信号定位算法。
AI.motivation: 现有无线信号室内定位算法缺乏高精度的标注数据集，难以准确评估其性能，因此需要构建包含真实位置信息的高质量数据集。
AI.method: 通过AR标记和冗余标记布局实现高精度定位，利用摄像头视频流进行标记识别、子集选择和滤波处理，获取毫米级位置信息，并同步采集BLE信标数据生成标注数据集。
AI.result: 将AR定位误差控制在0.05米以内，构建了包含真实位置标注的BLE无线信号数据集，可有效评估定位系统性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为无线信号室内定位算法提供了高精度的基准数据集，有助于推动相关算法的准确性和可靠性研究。

result: 将AR定位误差控制在0.05米以内，构建了包含真实位置标注的BLE无线信号数据集，可有效评估定位系统性能。
conclusion: 该框架为无线信号室内定位算法提供了高精度的基准数据集，有助于推动相关算法的准确性和可靠性研究。
search_text: An Indoor Localization Dataset and Data Collection Framework with High Precision Position Annotation 一种高精度位置标注的室内定位数据集和数据采集框架 We introduce a novel technique and an associated high resolution dataset that aims to precisely evaluate wireless signal based indoor positioning algorithms. The technique implements an augmented reality (AR) based positioning system that is used to annotate the wireless signal parameter data samples with high precision position data. We track the position of a practical and low cost navigable setup of cameras and a Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) beacon in an area decorated with AR markers. We maximize the performance of the AR-based localization by using a redundant number of markers. Video streams captured by the cameras are subjected to a series of marker recognition, subset selection and filtering operations to yield highly precise pose estimations. Our results show that we can reduce the positional error of the AR localization system to a rate under 0.05 meters. The position data are then used to annotate the BLE data that are captured simultaneously by the sensors stationed in the environment, hence, constructing a wireless signal data set with the ground truth, which allows a wireless signal based localization system to be evaluated accurately. 我们介绍了一种新技术和相关的高分辨率数据集，旨在精确评估基于无线信号的室内定位算法。该技术实现了基于增强现实 (AR) 的定位系统，用于用高精度位置数据注释无线信号参数数据样本。我们在装饰有 AR 标记的区域中跟踪实用且低成本的可导航摄像头和低功耗蓝牙 (BLE) 信标的位置。我们通过使用冗余数量的标记来最大化基于 AR 的定位的性能。摄像机捕获的视频流经过一系列标记识别、子集选择和过滤操作，以产生高精度的姿态估计。我们的结果表明，我们可以将 AR 定位系统的位置误差降低到 0.05 米以下。然后，位置数据用于注释由环境中的传感器同时捕获的 BLE 数据，从而构建具有地面实况的无线信号数据集，从而可以准确评估基于无线信号的定位系统。 本文提出一种基于增强现实（AR）的高精度室内定位数据集和数据采集框架，用于精确评估无线信号定位算法。 F. Serhan Daniş,A. Teoman Naskali,A. Taylan Cemgil,Cem Ersoy cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.NI,eess.SY

authors_text: Jiaxing Xu,Jianbin Cui,Jiangneng Li,Wenge Rong,Noboru Matsuda
title: Entity Aware Syntax Tree Based Data Augmentation for Natural Language Understanding
title_zh: 用于自然语言理解的基于实体感知语法树的数据增强
abstract: Understanding the intention of the users and recognizing the semantic entities from their sentences, aka natural language understanding (NLU), is the upstream task of many natural language processing tasks. One of the main challenges is to collect a sufficient amount of annotated data to train a model. Existing research about text augmentation does not abundantly consider entity and thus performs badly for NLU tasks. To solve this problem, we propose a novel NLP data augmentation technique, Entity Aware Data Augmentation (EADA), which applies a tree structure, Entity Aware Syntax Tree (EAST), to represent sentences combined with attention on the entity. Our EADA technique automatically constructs an EAST from a small amount of annotated data, and then generates a large number of training instances for intent detection and slot filling. Experimental results on four datasets showed that the proposed technique significantly outperforms the existing data augmentation methods in terms of both accuracy and generalization ability.
summary: Understanding the intention of the users and recognizing the semantic entities from their sentences, aka natural language understanding (NLU), is the upstream task of many natural language processing tasks. One of the main challenges is to collect a sufficient amount of annotated data to train a model. Existing research about text augmentation does not abundantly consider entity and thus performs badly for NLU tasks. To solve this problem, we propose a novel NLP data augmentation technique, Entity Aware Data Augmentation (EADA), which applies a tree structure, Entity Aware Syntax Tree (EAST), to represent sentences combined with attention on the entity. Our EADA technique automatically constructs an EAST from a small amount of annotated data, and then generates a large number of training instances for intent detection and slot filling. Experimental results on four datasets showed that the proposed technique significantly outperforms the existing data augmentation methods in terms of both accuracy and generalization ability.
abstract_zh: 理解用户的意图并从句子中识别语义实体，也称为自然语言理解（NLU），是许多自然语言处理任务的上游任务。主要挑战之一是收集足够数量的带注释数据来训练模型。现有的文本增强研究并未充分考虑实体，因此在 NLU 任务中表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 NLP 数据增强技术，实体感知数据增强（EADA），它应用树结构，实体感知语法树（EAST）来表示结合实体注意力的句子。我们的 EADA 技术自动从少量带注释的数据构建 EAST，然后生成大量训练实例用于意图检测和槽填充。四个数据集的实验结果表明，所提出的技术在准确性和泛化能力方面都显着优于现有的数据增强方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于实体感知语法树（EAST）的自然语言理解数据增强方法EADA，通过结合实体信息和句法结构生成训练数据，以解决NLU任务中标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文本增强方法未充分考虑实体信息，导致在需要理解用户意图和识别语义实体的NLU任务中表现不佳，亟需结合实体与句法结构的新型数据增强技术。
AI.method: 构建实体感知语法树（EAST）结构，通过注意力机制关联实体与句法成分，从少量标注数据自动生成大量训练样本用于意图检测和槽位填充任务。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上的实验表明，EADA在准确率和泛化能力上显著优于现有数据增强方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: EADA通过融合实体感知的句法树结构，有效提升了NLU任务的数据增强效果，为解决标注数据不足问题提供了新思路。

authors_text: Gurkirt Singh,Vasileios Choutas,Suman Saha,Fisher Yu,Luc Van Gool
title: Spatio-Temporal Action Detection Under Large Motion
title_zh: 大运动下的时空动作检测
abstract: Current methods for spatiotemporal action tube detection often extend a bounding box proposal at a given keyframe into a 3D temporal cuboid and pool features from nearby frames. However, such pooling fails to accumulate meaningful spatiotemporal features if the position or shape of the actor shows large 2D motion and variability through the frames, due to large camera motion, large actor shape deformation, fast actor action and so on. In this work, we aim to study the performance of cuboid-aware feature aggregation in action detection under large action. Further, we propose to enhance actor feature representation under large motion by tracking actors and performing temporal feature aggregation along the respective tracks. We define the actor motion with intersection-over-union (IoU) between the boxes of action tubes/tracks at various fixed time scales. The action having a large motion would result in lower IoU over time, and slower actions would maintain higher IoU. We find that track-aware feature aggregation consistently achieves a large improvement in action detection performance, especially for actions under large motion compared to the cuboid-aware baseline. As a result, we also report state-of-the-art on the large-scale MultiSports dataset. The Code is available at https://github.com/gurkirt/ActionTrackDetectron.
summary: Current methods for spatiotemporal action tube detection often extend a bounding box proposal at a given keyframe into a 3D temporal cuboid and pool features from nearby frames. However, such pooling fails to accumulate meaningful spatiotemporal features if the position or shape of the actor shows large 2D motion and variability through the frames, due to large camera motion, large actor shape deformation, fast actor action and so on. In this work, we aim to study the performance of cuboid-aware feature aggregation in action detection under large action. Further, we propose to enhance actor feature representation under large motion by tracking actors and performing temporal feature aggregation along the respective tracks. We define the actor motion with intersection-over-union (IoU) between the boxes of action tubes/tracks at various fixed time scales. The action having a large motion would result in lower IoU over time, and slower actions would maintain higher IoU. We find that track-aware feature aggregation consistently achieves a large improvement in action detection performance, especially for actions under large motion compared to the cuboid-aware baseline. As a result, we also report state-of-the-art on the large-scale MultiSports dataset. The Code is available at https://github.com/gurkirt/ActionTrackDetectron.
abstract_zh: 当前时空动作管检测的方法通常将给定关键帧处的边界框提议扩展到 3D 时间长方体并池化附近帧的特征。然而，如果由于摄像机运动较大、演员形状变形较大、演员动作较快等原因，演员的位置或形状在帧中显示出较大的 2D 运动和变化性，则这种池化无法积累有意义的时空特征。在这项工作中，我们的目标是研究长方体感知特征聚合在大动作下的动作检测中的性能。此外，我们建议通过跟踪演员并沿着各自的轨迹执行时间特征聚合来增强大运动下的演员特征表示。我们通过不同固定时间尺度的动作管/轨道框之间的交集（IoU）来定义演员运动。随着时间的推移，较大运动的动作会导致较低的 IoU，而较慢的动作将保持较高的 IoU。我们发现，与长方体感知基线相比，跟踪感知特征聚合始终在动作检测性能方面取得了很大的进步，特别是对于大运动下的动作。因此，我们还报告了大规模 MultiSports 数据集的最新技术。该代码可在 https://github.com/gurkirt/ActionTrackDetectron 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究大运动场景下的时空动作检测方法，通过跟踪演员并沿轨迹进行时序特征聚合，提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过扩展关键帧的边界框生成3D立方体并聚合邻近帧特征，但在大运动或变形场景下无法有效积累时空特征，导致检测效果下降。
AI.method: 提出基于轨迹的特征聚合方法，通过计算动作管/轨迹在固定时间尺度下的交并比（IoU）定义运动强度，并沿演员轨迹进行时序特征聚合。
AI.result: 在大规模MultiSports数据集上达到最先进水平，尤其在大运动动作检测中相比立方体感知基线有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹感知的特征聚合能有效应对大运动场景，为复杂动作检测提供新思路。

authors_text: Jeevanshi Sharma,Rajat Maheshwari,Yusuf Uzzaman Khan
title: Machine Learning For Classification Of Antithetical Emotional States
title_zh: 用于对对立情绪状态分类的机器学习
abstract: Emotion Classification through EEG signals has achieved many advancements. However, the problems like lack of data and learning the important features and patterns have always been areas with scope for improvement both computationally and in prediction accuracy. This works analyses the baseline machine learning classifiers' performance on DEAP Dataset along with a tabular learning approach that provided state-of-the-art comparable results leveraging the performance boost due to its deep learning architecture without deploying heavy neural networks.
summary: Emotion Classification through EEG signals has achieved many advancements. However, the problems like lack of data and learning the important features and patterns have always been areas with scope for improvement both computationally and in prediction accuracy. This works analyses the baseline machine learning classifiers' performance on DEAP Dataset along with a tabular learning approach that provided state-of-the-art comparable results leveraging the performance boost due to its deep learning architecture without deploying heavy neural networks.
abstract_zh: 通过脑电图信号进行情绪分类已经取得了许多进步。然而，诸如缺乏数据和学习重要特征和模式等问题一直是计算和预测精度有待改进的领域。这项工作分析了基准机器学习分类器在 DEAP 数据集上的性能以及表格学习方法，该方法提供了最先进的可比较结果，利用其深度学习架构带来的性能提升，而无需部署重型神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于DEAP数据集，通过对比传统机器学习分类器与表格学习方法在对立情绪状态分类中的性能，探索更高效的情绪分类模型。
AI.motivation: 现有情绪分类方法面临数据不足和特征提取困难的问题，需在计算效率和预测精度上寻求改进。
AI.method: 采用基线机器学习分类器，并结合表格学习方法，利用深度学习架构的优势提升性能，避免使用复杂神经网络。
AI.result: 表格学习方法在DEAP数据集上达到与现有技术相当的分类效果，同时降低了计算资源需求。
AI.conclusion: 表格学习为情绪分类提供了有效且轻量化的解决方案，未来可进一步优化特征提取与模型泛化能力。

authors_text: Haoyu Wang,Ziyan Huang,Jin Ye,Can Tu,Yuncheng Yang,Shiyi Du,Zhongying Deng,Chenglong Ma,Jingqi Niu,Junjun He
title: An evaluation of U-Net in Renal Structure Segmentation
title_zh: U-Net 在肾脏结构分割中的评价
abstract: Renal structure segmentation from computed tomography angiography~(CTA) is essential for many computer-assisted renal cancer treatment applications. Kidney PArsing~(KiPA 2022) Challenge aims to build a fine-grained multi-structure dataset and improve the segmentation of multiple renal structures. Recently, U-Net has dominated the medical image segmentation. In the KiPA challenge, we evaluated several U-Net variants and selected the best models for the final submission.
summary: Renal structure segmentation from computed tomography angiography~(CTA) is essential for many computer-assisted renal cancer treatment applications. Kidney PArsing~(KiPA 2022) Challenge aims to build a fine-grained multi-structure dataset and improve the segmentation of multiple renal structures. Recently, U-Net has dominated the medical image segmentation. In the KiPA challenge, we evaluated several U-Net variants and selected the best models for the final submission.
abstract_zh: 计算机断层扫描血管造影 (CTA) 的肾脏结构分割对于许多计算机辅助肾癌治疗应用至关重要。 Kidney PArsing~(KiPA 2022) 挑战赛旨在构建细粒度的多结构数据集并改进多个肾脏结构的分割。最近，U-Net 在医学图像分割领域占据主导地位。在 KiPA 挑战中，我们评估了几种 U-Net 变体，并为最终提交选择了最佳模型。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了U-Net在肾结构分割任务中的效果，特别是在KiPA 2022挑战赛中的应用。
AI.motivation: 肾结构分割对计算机辅助肾癌治疗至关重要，而KiPA挑战赛旨在推动多结构数据集的构建和分割技术的提升。
AI.method: 通过测试多种U-Net变体模型，筛选出性能最优的模型用于KiPA挑战赛的最终提交。
AI.result: 确定了适用于肾结构分割的最佳U-Net模型并应用于挑战赛。
AI.conclusion: U-Net及其变体在肾结构分割任务中表现有效，适合此类医学图像分割场景。

authors_text: Han Wang,Jun Tang,Xiaodong Liu,Shanyan Guan,Rong Xie,Li Song
title: PTSEFormer: Progressive Temporal-Spatial Enhanced TransFormer Towards Video Object Detection
title_zh: PTSEFormer：面向视频对象检测的渐进式时空增强 TransFormer
abstract: Recent years have witnessed a trend of applying context frames to boost the performance of object detection as video object detection. Existing methods usually aggregate features at one stroke to enhance the feature. These methods, however, usually lack spatial information from neighboring frames and suffer from insufficient feature aggregation. To address the issues, we perform a progressive way to introduce both temporal information and spatial information for an integrated enhancement. The temporal information is introduced by the temporal feature aggregation model (TFAM), by conducting an attention mechanism between the context frames and the target frame (i.e., the frame to be detected). Meanwhile, we employ a Spatial Transition Awareness Model (STAM) to convey the location transition information between each context frame and target frame. Built upon a transformer-based detector DETR, our PTSEFormer also follows an end-to-end fashion to avoid heavy post-processing procedures while achieving 88.1% mAP on the ImageNet VID dataset. Codes are available at https://github.com/Hon-Wong/PTSEFormer.
summary: Recent years have witnessed a trend of applying context frames to boost the performance of object detection as video object detection. Existing methods usually aggregate features at one stroke to enhance the feature. These methods, however, usually lack spatial information from neighboring frames and suffer from insufficient feature aggregation. To address the issues, we perform a progressive way to introduce both temporal information and spatial information for an integrated enhancement. The temporal information is introduced by the temporal feature aggregation model (TFAM), by conducting an attention mechanism between the context frames and the target frame (i.e., the frame to be detected). Meanwhile, we employ a Spatial Transition Awareness Model (STAM) to convey the location transition information between each context frame and target frame. Built upon a transformer-based detector DETR, our PTSEFormer also follows an end-to-end fashion to avoid heavy post-processing procedures while achieving 88.1% mAP on the ImageNet VID dataset. Codes are available at https://github.com/Hon-Wong/PTSEFormer.
abstract_zh: 近年来出现了应用上下文帧来提高视频对象检测的对象检测性能的趋势。现有的方法通常会一次性聚合特征来增强特征。然而，这些方法通常缺乏相邻帧的空间信息，并且特征聚合不足。为了解决这些问题，我们采用渐进的方式引入时间信息和空间信息以进行集成增强。时间信息是由时间特征聚合模型（TFAM）引入的，通过在上下文帧和目标帧（即要检测的帧）之间进行注意机制。同时，我们采用空间转换感知模型（STAM）来传达每个上下文帧和目标帧之间的位置转换信息。我们的 PTSEFormer 基于基于变压器的检测器 DETR 构建，还遵循端到端方式，以避免繁重的后处理程序，同时在 ImageNet VID 数据集上实现 88.1% 的 mAP。代码可在 https://github.com/Hon-Wong/PTSEFormer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PTSEFormer方法，通过渐进式融合时间与空间信息提升视频目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频目标检测方法在聚合上下文帧特征时缺乏相邻帧的空间信息，导致特征表达不足。
AI.method: 设计时序特征聚合模块（TFAM）和空间转换感知模块（STAM），分别建模时间关联与空间位置转换，基于DETR实现端到端检测。
AI.result: 在ImageNet VID数据集上达到88.1%的mAP，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 渐进式时空特征增强有效提升视频检测性能，未来可探索更高效的特征融合策略。

authors_text: Yang Yang,Mizuka Komatsu,Kenji Oyama,Takenao Ohkawa
title: Real-Time Cattle Interaction Recognition via Triple-stream Network
title_zh: 通过三流网络进行实时牛交互识别
abstract: In stockbreeding of beef cattle, computer vision-based approaches have been widely employed to monitor cattle conditions (e.g. the physical, physiology, and health). To this end, the accurate and effective recognition of cattle action is a prerequisite. Generally, most existing models are confined to individual behavior that uses video-based methods to extract spatial-temporal features for recognizing the individual actions of each cattle. However, there is sociality among cattle and their interaction usually reflects important conditions, e.g. estrus, and also video-based method neglects the real-time capability of the model. Based on this, we tackle the challenging task of real-time recognizing interactions between cattle in a single frame in this paper. The pipeline of our method includes two main modules: Cattle Localization Network and Interaction Recognition Network. At every moment, cattle localization network outputs high-quality interaction proposals from every detected cattle and feeds them into the interaction recognition network with a triple-stream architecture. Such a triple-stream network allows us to fuse different features relevant to recognizing interactions. Specifically, the three kinds of features are a visual feature that extracts the appearance representation of interaction proposals, a geometric feature that reflects the spatial relationship between cattle, and a semantic feature that captures our prior knowledge of the relationship between the individual action and interaction of cattle. In addition, to solve the problem of insufficient quantity of labeled data, we pre-train the model based on self-supervised learning. Qualitative and quantitative evaluation evidences the performance of our framework as an effective method to recognize cattle interaction in real time.
summary: In stockbreeding of beef cattle, computer vision-based approaches have been widely employed to monitor cattle conditions (e.g. the physical, physiology, and health). To this end, the accurate and effective recognition of cattle action is a prerequisite. Generally, most existing models are confined to individual behavior that uses video-based methods to extract spatial-temporal features for recognizing the individual actions of each cattle. However, there is sociality among cattle and their interaction usually reflects important conditions, e.g. estrus, and also video-based method neglects the real-time capability of the model. Based on this, we tackle the challenging task of real-time recognizing interactions between cattle in a single frame in this paper. The pipeline of our method includes two main modules: Cattle Localization Network and Interaction Recognition Network. At every moment, cattle localization network outputs high-quality interaction proposals from every detected cattle and feeds them into the interaction recognition network with a triple-stream architecture. Such a triple-stream network allows us to fuse different features relevant to recognizing interactions. Specifically, the three kinds of features are a visual feature that extracts the appearance representation of interaction proposals, a geometric feature that reflects the spatial relationship between cattle, and a semantic feature that captures our prior knowledge of the relationship between the individual action and interaction of cattle. In addition, to solve the problem of insufficient quantity of labeled data, we pre-train the model based on self-supervised learning. Qualitative and quantitative evaluation evidences the performance of our framework as an effective method to recognize cattle interaction in real time.
abstract_zh: 在肉牛养殖中，基于计算机视觉的方法已被广泛应用于监测牛的状况（例如身体、生理和健康）。为此，准确有效地识别牛的动作是前提。一般来说，大多数现有模型仅限于个体行为，使用基于视频的方法提取时空特征来识别每头牛的个体行为。然而，牛之间存在社会性，它们的相互作用通常反映了重要的条件，例如发情期，并且基于视频的方法忽略了模型的实时能力。基于此，我们在本文中解决了在单帧中实时识别牛之间交互的挑战性任务。我们方法的流程包括两个主要模块：牛定位网络和交互识别网络。每时每刻，牛定位网络都会从每头检测到的牛中输出高质量的交互建议，并将其输入到具有三流架构的交互识别网络中。这样的三流网络使我们能够融合与识别交互相关的不同特征。具体来说，这三种特征是提取交互建议的外观表示的视觉特征、反映牛之间空间关系的几何特征以及捕获我们对牛的个体动作和交互之间关系的先验知识的语义特征。此外，为了解决标记数据量不足的问题，我们基于自监督学习对模型进行预训练。定性和定量评估证明了我们的框架作为实时识别牛交互的有效方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于三流网络的实时牛群交互识别方法，通过融合视觉、几何和语义特征实现单帧内牛群交互行为的实时识别。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注个体行为识别且缺乏实时性，无法捕捉牛群社会性交互（如发情期）等重要状态，同时标注数据不足限制模型性能。
AI.method: 构建包含牛只定位网络和三流交互识别网络的双模块框架，通过自监督预训练解决数据不足问题，三流网络融合外观特征、空间关系特征及先验语义知识。
AI.result: 定性和定量评估验证了框架在实时牛群交互识别任务中的有效性，能够准确捕捉牛群间的交互行为。
AI.conclusion: 提出的三流网络框架为实时牛群交互识别提供了有效解决方案，通过多模态特征融合和自监督学习提升了模型性能。

search_text: Real-Time Cattle Interaction Recognition via Triple-stream Network 通过三流网络进行实时牛交互识别 In stockbreeding of beef cattle, computer vision-based approaches have been widely employed to monitor cattle conditions (e.g. the physical, physiology, and health). To this end, the accurate and effective recognition of cattle action is a prerequisite. Generally, most existing models are confined to individual behavior that uses video-based methods to extract spatial-temporal features for recognizing the individual actions of each cattle. However, there is sociality among cattle and their interaction usually reflects important conditions, e.g. estrus, and also video-based method neglects the real-time capability of the model. Based on this, we tackle the challenging task of real-time recognizing interactions between cattle in a single frame in this paper. The pipeline of our method includes two main modules: Cattle Localization Network and Interaction Recognition Network. At every moment, cattle localization network outputs high-quality interaction proposals from every detected cattle and feeds them into the interaction recognition network with a triple-stream architecture. Such a triple-stream network allows us to fuse different features relevant to recognizing interactions. Specifically, the three kinds of features are a visual feature that extracts the appearance representation of interaction proposals, a geometric feature that reflects the spatial relationship between cattle, and a semantic feature that captures our prior knowledge of the relationship between the individual action and interaction of cattle. In addition, to solve the problem of insufficient quantity of labeled data, we pre-train the model based on self-supervised learning. Qualitative and quantitative evaluation evidences the performance of our framework as an effective method to recognize cattle interaction in real time. 在肉牛养殖中，基于计算机视觉的方法已被广泛应用于监测牛的状况（例如身体、生理和健康）。为此，准确有效地识别牛的动作是前提。一般来说，大多数现有模型仅限于个体行为，使用基于视频的方法提取时空特征来识别每头牛的个体行为。然而，牛之间存在社会性，它们的相互作用通常反映了重要的条件，例如发情期，并且基于视频的方法忽略了模型的实时能力。基于此，我们在本文中解决了在单帧中实时识别牛之间交互的挑战性任务。我们方法的流程包括两个主要模块：牛定位网络和交互识别网络。每时每刻，牛定位网络都会从每头检测到的牛中输出高质量的交互建议，并将其输入到具有三流架构的交互识别网络中。这样的三流网络使我们能够融合与识别交互相关的不同特征。具体来说，这三种特征是提取交互建议的外观表示的视觉特征、反映牛之间空间关系的几何特征以及捕获我们对牛的个体动作和交互之间关系的先验知识的语义特征。此外，为了解决标记数据量不足的问题，我们基于自监督学习对模型进行预训练。定性和定量评估证明了我们的框架作为实时识别牛交互的有效方法的性能。 本文提出一种基于三流网络的实时牛群交互识别方法，通过融合视觉、几何和语义特征实现单帧内牛群交互行为的实时识别。 Yang Yang,Mizuka Komatsu,Kenji Oyama,Takenao Ohkawa cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yixiang Mao,Yueyu Hu,Yao Wang
title: Learning to Predict on Octree for Scalable Point Cloud Geometry Coding
title_zh: 学习预测八叉树以进行可扩展点云几何编码
comment: Accepted and presented at IEEE MIPR conference
comments: Accepted and presented at IEEE MIPR conference
abstract: Octree-based point cloud representation and compression have been adopted by the MPEG G-PCC standard. However, it only uses handcrafted methods to predict the probability that a leaf node is non-empty, which is then used for entropy coding. We propose a novel approach for predicting such probabilities for geometry coding, which applies a denoising neural network to a "noisy" context cube that includes both neighboring decoded voxels as well as uncoded voxels. We further propose a convolution-based model to upsample the decoded point cloud at a coarse resolution on the decoder side. Integration of the two approaches significantly improves the rate-distortion performance for geometry coding compared to the original G-PCC standard and other baseline methods for dense point clouds. The proposed octree-based entropy coding approach is naturally scalable, which is desirable for dynamic rate adaptation in point cloud streaming systems.
summary: Octree-based point cloud representation and compression have been adopted by the MPEG G-PCC standard. However, it only uses handcrafted methods to predict the probability that a leaf node is non-empty, which is then used for entropy coding. We propose a novel approach for predicting such probabilities for geometry coding, which applies a denoising neural network to a "noisy" context cube that includes both neighboring decoded voxels as well as uncoded voxels. We further propose a convolution-based model to upsample the decoded point cloud at a coarse resolution on the decoder side. Integration of the two approaches significantly improves the rate-distortion performance for geometry coding compared to the original G-PCC standard and other baseline methods for dense point clouds. The proposed octree-based entropy coding approach is naturally scalable, which is desirable for dynamic rate adaptation in point cloud streaming systems.
abstract_zh: MPEG G-PCC 标准已采用基于八叉树的点云表示和压缩。然而，它仅使用手工方法来预测叶节点非空的概率，然后将其用于熵编码。我们提出了一种预测几何编码概率的新方法，该方法将去噪神经网络应用于“嘈杂”的上下文立方体，其中包括相邻的已解码体素和未编码体素。我们进一步提出了一种基于卷积的模型，以在解码器侧以粗分辨率对解码的点云进行上采样。与原始 G-PCC 标准和其他密集点云基线方法相比，两种方法的集成显着提高了几何编码的率失真性能。所提出的基于八叉树的熵编码方法自然是可扩展的，这对于点云流系统中的动态速率自适应是理想的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于八叉树的点云几何编码方法，通过学习预测非空叶节点概率以提升压缩效率。
AI.motivation: 现有MPEG G-PCC标准采用手工设计的非空叶节点概率预测方法，难以有效适应复杂点云数据的压缩需求。
AI.method: 设计去噪神经网络预测包含已解码与未解码体素的上下文立方体概率，并结合解码端卷积上采样模型提升重建精度。
AI.result: 相较原始G-PCC标准及其他基线方法，在密集点云场景下显著提升率失真性能，且具备天然可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 所提八叉树熵编码方法有效改进点云压缩性能，适用于动态码率适应的流媒体系统。

authors_text: Farhad Aghili
title: Adaptive Machine Learning for Cooperative Manipulators
title_zh: 协作机械手的自适应机器学习
abstract: The problem of self-tuning control of cooperative manipulators forming a closed kinematic chain in the presence of an inaccurate kinematics model is addressed using adaptive machine learning. The kinematic parameters pertaining to the relative position/orientation uncertainties of the interconnected manipulators are updated online by two cascaded estimators in order to tune a cooperative controller for achieving accurate motion tracking with minimum-norm actuation force. This technique permits accurate calibration of the relative kinematics of the involved manipulators without needing high precision end-point sensing or force measurements, and hence it is economically justified. Investigating the stability of the entire real-time estimator/controller system reveals that the convergence and stability of the adaptive control process can be ensured if i) the direction of the angular velocity vector does not remain constant over time, and ii) the initial kinematic parameter error is upper bounded by a scaler function of some known parameters. The adaptive controller is proved to be singularity-free even though the control law involves inverting the approximation of a matrix computed at the estimated parameters. Experimental results demonstrate the sensitivity of the tracking performance of the conventional inverse dynamic control scheme to kinematic inaccuracies, while the tracking error is significantly reduced by the self-tuning cooperative controller.
summary: The problem of self-tuning control of cooperative manipulators forming a closed kinematic chain in the presence of an inaccurate kinematics model is addressed using adaptive machine learning. The kinematic parameters pertaining to the relative position/orientation uncertainties of the interconnected manipulators are updated online by two cascaded estimators in order to tune a cooperative controller for achieving accurate motion tracking with minimum-norm actuation force. This technique permits accurate calibration of the relative kinematics of the involved manipulators without needing high precision end-point sensing or force measurements, and hence it is economically justified. Investigating the stability of the entire real-time estimator/controller system reveals that the convergence and stability of the adaptive control process can be ensured if i) the direction of the angular velocity vector does not remain constant over time, and ii) the initial kinematic parameter error is upper bounded by a scaler function of some known parameters. The adaptive controller is proved to be singularity-free even though the control law involves inverting the approximation of a matrix computed at the estimated parameters. Experimental results demonstrate the sensitivity of the tracking performance of the conventional inverse dynamic control scheme to kinematic inaccuracies, while the tracking error is significantly reduced by the self-tuning cooperative controller.
abstract_zh: 使用自适应机器学习解决了在运动学模型不准确的情况下形成闭合运动链的协作机械手的自调节控制问题。与互连操纵器的相对位置/方向不确定性相关的运动学参数由两个级联估计器在线更新，以便调整协作控制器，从而以最小标准驱动力实现精确的运动跟踪。该技术允许对所涉及的操纵器的相对运动学进行精确校准，而不需要高精度端点感测或力测量，因此在经济上是合理的。研究整个实时估计器/控制器系统的稳定性表明，如果i）角速度矢量的方向不随时间保持恒定，并且ii）初始运动参数误差的上限由一些已知参数的缩放函数确定，则可以确保自适应控制过程的收敛性和稳定性。即使控制律涉及反转在估计参数下计算的矩阵的近似值，自适应控制器也被证明是无奇点的。实验结果证明了传统逆动态控制方案的跟踪性能对运动学误差的敏感性，而自校正协作控制器则显着降低了跟踪误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自适应机器学习的协作机械臂控制方法，用于解决存在运动学模型不准确情况下的自调谐控制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统协作机械臂控制依赖高精度末端传感或力测量，成本高昂且难以应对运动学模型误差，需开发经济高效的自适应控制方案。
AI.method: 通过两个级联估计器在线更新机械臂相对位姿的运动学参数，结合自适应控制器实现最小范数驱动的精确运动跟踪，并证明系统稳定性条件。
AI.result: 实验表明，传统逆动力学控制对运动学误差敏感，而自调谐控制器显著降低了跟踪误差，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该自适应控制器无需高精度传感即可实现稳定控制，满足经济性要求，为协作机械臂提供了鲁棒的运动学参数校准方案。
