search_text: Adaptive Machine Learning for Cooperative Manipulators 协作机械手的自适应机器学习 The problem of self-tuning control of cooperative manipulators forming a closed kinematic chain in the presence of an inaccurate kinematics model is addressed using adaptive machine learning. The kinematic parameters pertaining to the relative position/orientation uncertainties of the interconnected manipulators are updated online by two cascaded estimators in order to tune a cooperative controller for achieving accurate motion tracking with minimum-norm actuation force. This technique permits accurate calibration of the relative kinematics of the involved manipulators without needing high precision end-point sensing or force measurements, and hence it is economically justified. Investigating the stability of the entire real-time estimator/controller system reveals that the convergence and stability of the adaptive control process can be ensured if i) the direction of the angular velocity vector does not remain constant over time, and ii) the initial kinematic parameter error is upper bounded by a scaler function of some known parameters. The adaptive controller is proved to be singularity-free even though the control law involves inverting the approximation of a matrix computed at the estimated parameters. Experimental results demonstrate the sensitivity of the tracking performance of the conventional inverse dynamic control scheme to kinematic inaccuracies, while the tracking error is significantly reduced by the self-tuning cooperative controller. 使用自适应机器学习解决了在运动学模型不准确的情况下形成闭合运动链的协作机械手的自调节控制问题。与互连操纵器的相对位置/方向不确定性相关的运动学参数由两个级联估计器在线更新，以便调整协作控制器，从而以最小标准驱动力实现精确的运动跟踪。该技术允许对所涉及的操纵器的相对运动学进行精确校准，而不需要高精度端点感测或力测量，因此在经济上是合理的。研究整个实时估计器/控制器系统的稳定性表明，如果i）角速度矢量的方向不随时间保持恒定，并且ii）初始运动参数误差的上限由一些已知参数的缩放函数确定，则可以确保自适应控制过程的收敛性和稳定性。即使控制律涉及反转在估计参数下计算的矩阵的近似值，自适应控制器也被证明是无奇点的。实验结果证明了传统逆动态控制方案的跟踪性能对运动学误差的敏感性，而自校正协作控制器则显着降低了跟踪误差。 本文提出了一种基于自适应机器学习的协作机械臂控制方法，用于解决存在运动学模型不准确情况下的自调谐控制问题。 Farhad Aghili cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Ziyuan Xiao,Yina Han,Susanto Rahardja,Yuanliang Ma
title: USLN: A statistically guided lightweight network for underwater image enhancement via dual-statistic white balance and multi-color space stretch
title_zh: USLN：统计引导的轻量级网络，通过双统计白平衡和多色空间拉伸来增强水下图像
abstract: Underwater images are inevitably affected by color distortion and reduced contrast. Traditional statistic-based methods such as white balance and histogram stretching attempted to adjust the imbalance of color channels and narrow distribution of intensities a priori thus with limited performance. Recently, deep-learning-based methods have achieved encouraging results. However, the involved complicate architecture and high computational costs may hinder their deployment in practical constrained platforms. Inspired by above works, we propose a statistically guided lightweight underwater image enhancement network (USLN). Concretely, we first develop a dual-statistic white balance module which can learn to use both average and maximum of images to compensate the color distortion for each specific pixel. Then this is followed by a multi-color space stretch module to adjust the histogram distribution in RGB, HSI, and Lab color spaces adaptively. Extensive experiments show that, with the guidance of statistics, USLN significantly reduces the required network capacity (over98%) and achieves state-of-the-art performance. The code and relevant resources are available at https://github.com/deepxzy/USLN.
summary: Underwater images are inevitably affected by color distortion and reduced contrast. Traditional statistic-based methods such as white balance and histogram stretching attempted to adjust the imbalance of color channels and narrow distribution of intensities a priori thus with limited performance. Recently, deep-learning-based methods have achieved encouraging results. However, the involved complicate architecture and high computational costs may hinder their deployment in practical constrained platforms. Inspired by above works, we propose a statistically guided lightweight underwater image enhancement network (USLN). Concretely, we first develop a dual-statistic white balance module which can learn to use both average and maximum of images to compensate the color distortion for each specific pixel. Then this is followed by a multi-color space stretch module to adjust the histogram distribution in RGB, HSI, and Lab color spaces adaptively. Extensive experiments show that, with the guidance of statistics, USLN significantly reduces the required network capacity (over98%) and achieves state-of-the-art performance. The code and relevant resources are available at https://github.com/deepxzy/USLN.
abstract_zh: 水下图像不可避免地会受到色彩失真和对比度降低的影响。传统的基于统计的方法（例如白平衡和直方图拉伸）试图先验地调整颜色通道的不平衡和强度的狭窄分布，因此性能有限。最近，基于深度学习的方法取得了令人鼓舞的成果。然而，所涉及的复杂架构和高计算成本可能会阻碍它们在实际受限平台中的部署。受上述工作的启发，我们提出了一种统计引导的轻量级水下图像增强网络（USLN）。具体来说，我们首先开发一个双统计白平衡模块，它可以学习使用图像的平均值和最大值来补偿每个特定像素的颜色失真。然后是多颜色空间拉伸模块，自适应调整 RGB、HSI 和 Lab 颜色空间中的直方图分布。大量实验表明，在统计数据的指导下，USLN 显着降低了所需的网络容量（超过 98%），并实现了最先进的性能。代码和相关资源可在 https://github.com/deepxzy/USLN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级水下图像增强网络USLN，通过双统计白平衡和多色空间拉伸技术提升水下图像质量。
AI.motivation: 传统统计方法性能有限，深度学习方法计算成本高，需设计高效轻量的水下图像增强模型以适应实际应用场景。
AI.method: 开发双统计白平衡模块（利用图像均值与最大值进行像素级色彩校正）和多色空间拉伸模块（自适应调整RGB/HSI/Lab空间直方图分布）。
AI.result: 网络容量减少98%以上，在多个数据集上达到最先进性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 统计引导的轻量网络设计有效平衡了计算效率与增强效果，为水下视觉应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Patrick McGarey,Issa A. Nesnas,Adarsh Rajguru,Matthew Bezkrovny,Vahraz Jamnejad,Jim Lux,Eric Sunada,Lawrence Teitelbaum,Alexander Miller,Steve W. Squyres,Gregg Hallinan,Alex Hegedus,Jack O. Burns
title: How to Deploy a 10-km Interferometric Radio Telescope on the Moon with Just Four Tethered Robots
title_zh: 如何仅用四个系留机器人在月球上部署 10 公里干涉射电望远镜
comment: 8 pages, 17 figures, IEEE Aerospace Conference Proceedings, 2021
comments: 8 pages, 17 figures, IEEE Aerospace Conference Proceedings, 2021
abstract: The Far-side Array for Radio Science Investigations of the Dark ages and Exoplanets (FARSIDE) is a proposed mission concept to the lunar far side that seeks to deploy and operate an array of 128 dual-polarization, dipole antennas over a region of 100 square kilometers. The resulting interferometric radio telescope would provide unprecedented radio images of distant star systems, allowing for the investigation of faint radio signatures of coronal mass ejections and energetic particle events and could also lead to the detection of magnetospheres around exoplanets within their parent star's habitable zone. Simultaneously, FARSIDE would also measure the "Dark Ages" of the early Universe at a global 21-cm signal across a range of red shifts (z approximately 50-100). Each discrete antenna node in the array is connected to a central hub (located at the lander) via a communication and power tether. Nodes are driven by cold=operable electronics that continuously monitor an extremely wide-band of frequencies (200 kHz to 40 MHz), which surpass the capabilities of Earth-based telescopes by two orders of magnitude. Achieving this ground-breaking capability requires a robust deployment strategy on the lunar surface, which is feasible with existing, high TRL technologies (demonstrated or under active development) and is capable of delivery to the surface on next-generation commercial landers, such as Blue Origin's Blue Moon Lander. This paper presents an antenna packaging, placement, and surface deployment trade study that leverages recent advances in tethered mobile robots under development at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory, which are used to deploy a flat, antenna-embedded, tape tether with optical communication and power transmission capabilities.
summary: The Far-side Array for Radio Science Investigations of the Dark ages and Exoplanets (FARSIDE) is a proposed mission concept to the lunar far side that seeks to deploy and operate an array of 128 dual-polarization, dipole antennas over a region of 100 square kilometers. The resulting interferometric radio telescope would provide unprecedented radio images of distant star systems, allowing for the investigation of faint radio signatures of coronal mass ejections and energetic particle events and could also lead to the detection of magnetospheres around exoplanets within their parent star's habitable zone. Simultaneously, FARSIDE would also measure the "Dark Ages" of the early Universe at a global 21-cm signal across a range of red shifts (z approximately 50-100). Each discrete antenna node in the array is connected to a central hub (located at the lander) via a communication and power tether. Nodes are driven by cold=operable electronics that continuously monitor an extremely wide-band of frequencies (200 kHz to 40 MHz), which surpass the capabilities of Earth-based telescopes by two orders of magnitude. Achieving this ground-breaking capability requires a robust deployment strategy on the lunar surface, which is feasible with existing, high TRL technologies (demonstrated or under active development) and is capable of delivery to the surface on next-generation commercial landers, such as Blue Origin's Blue Moon Lander. This paper presents an antenna packaging, placement, and surface deployment trade study that leverages recent advances in tethered mobile robots under development at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory, which are used to deploy a flat, antenna-embedded, tape tether with optical communication and power transmission capabilities.
abstract_zh: 用于黑暗时代和系外行星无线电科学调查的远侧阵列 (FARSIDE) 是一项拟议的月球远侧任务概念，旨在在 100 平方公里的区域内部署和操作由 128 个双极化偶极子天线组成的阵列。由此产生的干涉射电望远镜将提供遥远恒星系统前所未有的射电图像，从而可以研究日冕物质抛射和高能粒子事件的微弱射电信号，还可以探测到母星宜居带内系外行星周围的磁层。同时，FARSIDE 还将通过一系列红移（z 约为 50-100）的全球 21 厘米信号测量早期宇宙的“黑暗时代”。阵列中的每个离散天线节点通过通信和电源系绳连接到中央集线器（位于着陆器处）。节点由可冷操作的电子设备驱动，可连续监测极宽的频率（200 kHz 至 40 MHz），这超出了地球望远镜的能力两个数量级。实现这种突破性的能力需要在月球表面制定强有力的部署策略，这对于现有的高 TRL 技术（已验证或正在积极开发）来说是可行的，并且能够通过下一代商业着陆器（例如蓝色起源的蓝月着陆器）运送到月球表面。本文介绍了一项天线封装、放置和表面部署贸易研究，该研究利用了 NASA 喷气推进实验室正在开发的系留移动机器人的最新进展，该机器人用于部署具有光通信和电力传输功能的扁平、嵌入式天线、带系绳。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用四台系绳机器人部署月球背面10公里干涉式射电望远镜阵列的方案，以实现FARSIDE任务的科学目标。
AI.motivation: 通过月球背面部署超大射电望远镜阵列，可突破地球电离层干扰，研究宇宙黑暗时代21cm信号及系外行星磁层，同时探测太阳系高能粒子事件。
AI.method: 基于NASA JPL开发的系绳移动机器人技术，设计带光学通信与供电功能的柔性系绳，通过机器人协同展开嵌入式天线阵列，结合高TRL技术验证部署可行性。
AI.result: 论证了使用商业着陆器（如Blue Moon）运输并部署128个天线节点的可行性，证明该方案可满足FARSIDE任务对宽频段（200kHz-40MHz）观测的需求。
AI.conclusion: 该部署方案通过现有技术即可实现，为月球背面开展前宇宙研究和系外行星探测提供了可行的工程路径。

motivation: 通过月球背面部署超大射电望远镜阵列，可突破地球电离层干扰，研究宇宙黑暗时代21cm信号及系外行星磁层，同时探测太阳系高能粒子事件。
method: 基于NASA JPL开发的系绳移动机器人技术，设计带光学通信与供电功能的柔性系绳，通过机器人协同展开嵌入式天线阵列，结合高TRL技术验证部署可行性。
result: 论证了使用商业着陆器（如Blue Moon）运输并部署128个天线节点的可行性，证明该方案可满足FARSIDE任务对宽频段（200kHz-40MHz）观测的需求。
conclusion: 该部署方案通过现有技术即可实现，为月球背面开展前宇宙研究和系外行星探测提供了可行的工程路径。
search_text: How to Deploy a 10-km Interferometric Radio Telescope on the Moon with Just Four Tethered Robots 如何仅用四个系留机器人在月球上部署 10 公里干涉射电望远镜 The Far-side Array for Radio Science Investigations of the Dark ages and Exoplanets (FARSIDE) is a proposed mission concept to the lunar far side that seeks to deploy and operate an array of 128 dual-polarization, dipole antennas over a region of 100 square kilometers. The resulting interferometric radio telescope would provide unprecedented radio images of distant star systems, allowing for the investigation of faint radio signatures of coronal mass ejections and energetic particle events and could also lead to the detection of magnetospheres around exoplanets within their parent star's habitable zone. Simultaneously, FARSIDE would also measure the "Dark Ages" of the early Universe at a global 21-cm signal across a range of red shifts (z approximately 50-100). Each discrete antenna node in the array is connected to a central hub (located at the lander) via a communication and power tether. Nodes are driven by cold=operable electronics that continuously monitor an extremely wide-band of frequencies (200 kHz to 40 MHz), which surpass the capabilities of Earth-based telescopes by two orders of magnitude. Achieving this ground-breaking capability requires a robust deployment strategy on the lunar surface, which is feasible with existing, high TRL technologies (demonstrated or under active development) and is capable of delivery to the surface on next-generation commercial landers, such as Blue Origin's Blue Moon Lander. This paper presents an antenna packaging, placement, and surface deployment trade study that leverages recent advances in tethered mobile robots under development at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory, which are used to deploy a flat, antenna-embedded, tape tether with optical communication and power transmission capabilities. 用于黑暗时代和系外行星无线电科学调查的远侧阵列 (FARSIDE) 是一项拟议的月球远侧任务概念，旨在在 100 平方公里的区域内部署和操作由 128 个双极化偶极子天线组成的阵列。由此产生的干涉射电望远镜将提供遥远恒星系统前所未有的射电图像，从而可以研究日冕物质抛射和高能粒子事件的微弱射电信号，还可以探测到母星宜居带内系外行星周围的磁层。同时，FARSIDE 还将通过一系列红移（z 约为 50-100）的全球 21 厘米信号测量早期宇宙的“黑暗时代”。阵列中的每个离散天线节点通过通信和电源系绳连接到中央集线器（位于着陆器处）。节点由可冷操作的电子设备驱动，可连续监测极宽的频率（200 kHz 至 40 MHz），这超出了地球望远镜的能力两个数量级。实现这种突破性的能力需要在月球表面制定强有力的部署策略，这对于现有的高 TRL 技术（已验证或正在积极开发）来说是可行的，并且能够通过下一代商业着陆器（例如蓝色起源的蓝月着陆器）运送到月球表面。本文介绍了一项天线封装、放置和表面部署贸易研究，该研究利用了 NASA 喷气推进实验室正在开发的系留移动机器人的最新进展，该机器人用于部署具有光通信和电力传输功能的扁平、嵌入式天线、带系绳。 本文提出了一种利用四台系绳机器人部署月球背面10公里干涉式射电望远镜阵列的方案，以实现FARSIDE任务的科学目标。 Patrick McGarey,Issa A. Nesnas,Adarsh Rajguru,Matthew Bezkrovny,Vahraz Jamnejad,Jim Lux,Eric Sunada,Lawrence Teitelbaum,Alexander Miller,Steve W. Squyres,Gregg Hallinan,Alex Hegedus,Jack O. authors_text: Yuhui Hao,Bo Yu,Qiang Liu,Shaoshan Liu,Yuhao Zhu
title: Factor Graph Accelerator for LiDAR-Inertial Odometry
title_zh: 用于 LiDAR 惯性里程计的因子图加速器
abstract: Factor graph is a graph representing the factorization of a probability distribution function, and has been utilized in many autonomous machine computing tasks, such as localization, tracking, planning and control etc. We are developing an architecture with the goal of using factor graph as a common abstraction for most, if not, all autonomous machine computing tasks. If successful, the architecture would provide a very simple interface of mapping autonomous machine functions to the underlying compute hardware. As a first step of such an attempt, this paper presents our most recent work of developing a factor graph accelerator for LiDAR-Inertial Odometry (LIO), an essential task in many autonomous machines, such as autonomous vehicles and mobile robots. By modeling LIO as a factor graph, the proposed accelerator not only supports multi-sensor fusion such as LiDAR, inertial measurement unit (IMU), GPS, etc., but solves the global optimization problem of robot navigation in batch or incremental modes. Our evaluation demonstrates that the proposed design significantly improves the real-time performance and energy efficiency of autonomous machine navigation systems. The initial success suggests the potential of generalizing the factor graph architecture as a common abstraction for autonomous machine computing, including tracking, planning, and control etc.
summary: Factor graph is a graph representing the factorization of a probability distribution function, and has been utilized in many autonomous machine computing tasks, such as localization, tracking, planning and control etc. We are developing an architecture with the goal of using factor graph as a common abstraction for most, if not, all autonomous machine computing tasks. If successful, the architecture would provide a very simple interface of mapping autonomous machine functions to the underlying compute hardware. As a first step of such an attempt, this paper presents our most recent work of developing a factor graph accelerator for LiDAR-Inertial Odometry (LIO), an essential task in many autonomous machines, such as autonomous vehicles and mobile robots. By modeling LIO as a factor graph, the proposed accelerator not only supports multi-sensor fusion such as LiDAR, inertial measurement unit (IMU), GPS, etc., but solves the global optimization problem of robot navigation in batch or incremental modes. Our evaluation demonstrates that the proposed design significantly improves the real-time performance and energy efficiency of autonomous machine navigation systems. The initial success suggests the potential of generalizing the factor graph architecture as a common abstraction for autonomous machine computing, including tracking, planning, and control etc.
abstract_zh: 因子图是表示概率分布函数分解的图，已用于许多自主机器计算任务，例如定位、跟踪、规划和控制等。我们正在开发一种架构，目标是使用因子图作为大多数（如果不是所有）自主机器计算任务的通用抽象。如果成功，该架构将提供一个非常简单的接口，将自主机器功能映射到底层计算硬件。作为这种尝试的第一步，本文介绍了我们为 LiDAR 惯性里程计 (LIO) 开发因子图加速器的最新工作，这是许多自主机器（例如自动驾驶车辆和移动机器人）中的一项基本任务。通过将LIO建模为因子图，所提出的加速器不仅支持LiDAR、惯性测量单元（IMU）、GPS等多传感器融合，而且解决了批量或增量模式下机器人导航的全局优化问题。我们的评估表明，所提出的设计显着提高了自主机器导航系统的实时性能和能源效率。初步的成功表明将因子图架构推广为自主机器计算的通用抽象的潜力，包括跟踪、规划和控制等。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种因子图加速器，用于改进激光雷达惯性里程计（LIO）的实时性能和能源效率。
AI.motivation: 因子图作为概率分布分解的通用抽象，可简化自主机器计算任务与硬件的接口，但现有架构尚未充分实现这一目标。
AI.method: 将LIO建模为因子图，设计支持多传感器融合（LiDAR/IMU/GPS）的加速器，并通过批量或增量模式求解机器人导航的全局优化问题。
AI.result: 实验表明该设计显著提升了自主导航系统的实时性与能效，验证了因子图架构在LIO任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 因子图加速器在LIO中的成功应用表明，该架构有望成为自主机器计算（跟踪、规划、控制等）的通用抽象框架。

authors_text: Guangrong Zhao,Yiran Shen,Ning Chen,Pengfei Hu,Lei Liu,Hongkai Wen
title: High Speed Rotation Estimation with Dynamic Vision Sensors
title_zh: 使用动态视觉传感器进行高速旋转估计
abstract: Rotational speed is one of the important metrics to be measured for calibrating the electric motors in manufacturing, monitoring engine during car repairing, faults detection on electrical appliance and etc. However, existing measurement techniques either require prohibitive hardware (e.g., high-speed camera) or are inconvenient to use in real-world application scenarios. In this paper, we propose, EV-Tach, an event-based tachometer via efficient dynamic vision sensing on mobile devices. EV-Tach is designed as a high-fidelity and convenient tachometer by introducing dynamic vision sensor as a new sensing modality to capture the high-speed rotation precisely under various real-world scenarios. By designing a series of signal processing algorithms bespoke for dynamic vision sensing on mobile devices, EV-Tach is able to extract the rotational speed accurately from the event stream produced by dynamic vision sensing on rotary targets. According to our extensive evaluations, the Relative Mean Absolute Error (RMAE) of EV-Tach is as low as 0.03% which is comparable to the state-of-the-art laser tachometer under fixed measurement mode. Moreover, EV-Tach is robust to subtle movement of user's hand, therefore, can be used as a handheld device, where the laser tachometer fails to produce reasonable results.
summary: Rotational speed is one of the important metrics to be measured for calibrating the electric motors in manufacturing, monitoring engine during car repairing, faults detection on electrical appliance and etc. However, existing measurement techniques either require prohibitive hardware (e.g., high-speed camera) or are inconvenient to use in real-world application scenarios. In this paper, we propose, EV-Tach, an event-based tachometer via efficient dynamic vision sensing on mobile devices. EV-Tach is designed as a high-fidelity and convenient tachometer by introducing dynamic vision sensor as a new sensing modality to capture the high-speed rotation precisely under various real-world scenarios. By designing a series of signal processing algorithms bespoke for dynamic vision sensing on mobile devices, EV-Tach is able to extract the rotational speed accurately from the event stream produced by dynamic vision sensing on rotary targets. According to our extensive evaluations, the Relative Mean Absolute Error (RMAE) of EV-Tach is as low as 0.03% which is comparable to the state-of-the-art laser tachometer under fixed measurement mode. Moreover, EV-Tach is robust to subtle movement of user's hand, therefore, can be used as a handheld device, where the laser tachometer fails to produce reasonable results.
abstract_zh: 转速是制造过程中电机校准、汽车维修过程中发动机监控、电器故障检测等需要测量的重要指标之一。然而，现有的测量技术要么需要过高的硬件（例如高速摄像头），要么不方便在实际应用场景中使用。在本文中，我们提出了 EV-Tach，这是一种基于事件的转速计，通过移动设备上的高效动态视觉传感来实现。 EV-Tach 是一款高保真、便捷的转速计，引入动态视觉传感器作为一种新的传感方式，可以精确捕捉各种现实场景下的高速旋转。通过设计一系列为移动设备上的动态视觉传感定制的信号处理算法，EV-Tach 能够从旋转目标上的动态视觉传感产生的事件流中准确提取旋转速度。根据我们的广泛评估，EV-Tach 的相对平均绝对误差 (RMAE) 低至 0.03%，在固定测量模式下可与最先进的激光转速计相媲美。此外，EV-Tach 对用户手部的细微运动具有鲁棒性，因此可以用作激光转速计无法产生合理结果的手持设备。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态视觉传感器的高精度转速测量方法EV-Tach，用于移动设备上的高速旋转估计。
AI.motivation: 现有转速测量技术依赖昂贵硬件或不适用于实际场景，亟需一种高精度且便携的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计事件驱动的动态视觉传感系统，结合定制信号处理算法，从旋转目标的事件流中提取转速信息。
AI.result: EV-Tach在固定模式下相对平均绝对误差低至0.03%，且对用户手部微小移动具有鲁棒性，可作为手持设备使用。
AI.conclusion: EV-Tach为工业校准、汽车维修等场景提供了高精度、低成本的便携式转速测量解决方案。

By designing a series of signal processing algorithms bespoke for dynamic vision sensing on mobile devices, EV-Tach is able to extract the rotational speed accurately from the event stream produced by dynamic vision sensing on rotary targets. According to our extensive evaluations, the Relative Mean Absolute Error (RMAE) of EV-Tach is as low as 0.03% which is comparable to the state-of-the-art laser tachometer under fixed measurement mode. Moreover, EV-Tach is robust to subtle movement of user's hand, therefore, can be used as a handheld device, where the laser tachometer fails to produce reasonable results. 转速是制造过程中电机校准、汽车维修过程中发动机监控、电器故障检测等需要测量的重要指标之一。然而，现有的测量技术要么需要过高的硬件（例如高速摄像头），要么不方便在实际应用场景中使用。在本文中，我们提出了 EV-Tach，这是一种基于事件的转速计，通过移动设备上的高效动态视觉传感来实现。 EV-Tach 是一款高保真、便捷的转速计，引入动态视觉传感器作为一种新的传感方式，可以精确捕捉各种现实场景下的高速旋转。通过设计一系列为移动设备上的动态视觉传感定制的信号处理算法，EV-Tach 能够从旋转目标上的动态视觉传感产生的事件流中准确提取旋转速度。根据我们的广泛评估，EV-Tach 的相对平均绝对误差 (RMAE) 低至 0.03%，在固定测量模式下可与最先进的激光转速计相媲美。此外，EV-Tach 对用户手部的细微运动具有鲁棒性，因此可以用作激光转速计无法产生合理结果的手持设备。 本文提出了一种基于动态视觉传感器的高精度转速测量方法EV-Tach，用于移动设备上的高速旋转估计。 Guangrong Zhao,Yiran Shen,Ning Chen,Pengfei Hu,Lei Liu,Hongkai Wen cs.CV,eess.SY
